name: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills)
address: Th n An Sơn - X B N - Th nh phố Đ Nẵng - Việt Nam, Hòa Ninh, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam
description:
Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills - Nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khách sạn 4.0 sao tọa lạc tại thành phố Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam. Với một loạt các tiện nghi và dịch vụ chất lượng, khách sạn này là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố và khu vực xung quanh.

Khách sạn có tổng cộng 461 phòng nghỉ rộng rãi và thoải mái, mang đến cho du khách không gian nghỉ ngơi tuyệt vời. Năm xây dựng của khách sạn là 2016, và năm cập nhật gần nhất là 2022, đảm bảo rằng các phòng nghỉ được trang bị các tiện nghi hiện đại và tiện lợi nhất. 

Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 30km và sân bay chỉ mất khoảng 40 phút di chuyển. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng là 10:30 AM, giúp du khách có đủ thời gian tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại đây. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cũng cho phép trẻ em từ 2 đến 11 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam với nhiều tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Khách sạn này cung cấp một số cửa hàng để bạn mua sắm và tìm hiểu văn hóa địa phương. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức đồ uống tại quầy bar của khách sạn. Nếu bạn muốn làm mới bản thân, hãy ghé thăm salon và tận hưởng dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp. Ngoài ra, bạn còn có thể thả lỏng cơ thể và thư giãn tại bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và phòng sauna. Để tận hưởng trọn vẹn kỳ nghỉ của mình, hãy ghé thăm spa của khách sạn để được chăm sóc và làm đẹp. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng những giây phút vui vẻ, hãy đến phòng trò chơi hoặc khu vực chung để xem TV. Khách sạn còn có phòng karaoke để bạn thể hiện tài năng ca hát của mình. Cuối cùng, hãy ghé qua cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để mang về những món đồ độc đáo làm kỷ niệm cho chuyến du lịch của bạn.

Các Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam với nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng. Khách sạn này cung cấp một hồ bơi trong nhà tiện lợi, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và tập luyện. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một trung tâm thể dục miễn phí, nơi bạn có thể rèn luyện sức khỏe và thể lực của mình.

Nếu bạn yêu thích các hoạt động ngoài trời, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cũng có nhiều tiện ích thể thao khác như bàn bóng bàn, sân chơi bowling và bảng phi tiêu. Bạn có thể tham gia vào các trò chơi này cùng gia đình và bạn bè để tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có các đường dẫn leo núi tuyệt đẹp, cho phép bạn khám phá thiên nhiên và thử thách bản thân. Hãy tận hưởng những hoạt động thể thao và giải trí tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills!

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills tọa lạc tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi hàng đầu. Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, quý khách có thể yên tâm gọi đồ ăn và đồ uống ngay tại phòng của mình. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho quý khách.

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cũng có các tiện ích khác như hộp đựng đồ an toàn, dịch vụ lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong khu vực công cộng và tất cả các phòng. Nếu quý khách có nhu cầu làm việc hoặc giải trí, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ trả phòng nhanh chóng. Bên cạnh đó, quý khách cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ để giữ hành lý và đảm bảo an toàn cho các vật dụng cá nhân của mình. Với tất cả những tiện ích này, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cam kết mang đến cho quý khách một trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện lợi.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách. Khách sạn có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách thuận tiện. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đỗ xe valet và bãi đỗ xe, giúp khách hàng không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe. 

Đối với khách hàng muốn tự lái xe, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cung cấp dịch vụ cho thuê xe, giúp khách hàng có thể tự do khám phá vùng đất Đà Nẵng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí, giúp khách hàng di chuyển dễ dàng từ khách sạn đến các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Nếu khách hàng muốn di chuyển bằng taxi, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt xe taxi, đảm bảo sự thuận tiện và an toàn cho khách hàng. Khách sạn cũng có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí, giúp khách hàng không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe.

Thưởng thức ẩm thực tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tuyệt vời. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, cho phép bạn thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại chính phòng nghỉ của mình. Bạn cũng có thể ghé qua quán cà phê để thưởng thức một ly cà phê thơm ngon hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn nhẹ tại đây.

Ngoài ra, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills còn có nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng và ngon miệng. Bạn có thể tận hưởng bữa sáng tự chọn tại nhà hàng hoặc thưởng thức bữa sáng kiểu châu Âu truyền thống. Dịch vụ phục vụ phòng hàng ngày cũng được cung cấp để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và sạch sẽ cho khách hàng. Với các tiện ích ẩm thực tuyệt vời như vậy, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đáng để bạn khám phá và tận hưởng.

Trải Nghiệm Phòng Nghỉ Đa Dạng Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng nghỉ phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Từ các phòng tiêu chuẩn như Standard Room With King Size Bed và Standard Room With Twin Beds, đến các phòng cao cấp như Superior Room With King Size Bed hay Superior Room With Twin Beds, mỗi loại phòng đều mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa trong không gian 22-25 mét vuông. Đối với những gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn, các lựa chọn như Family Superior With 1 King Bed And 1 Bunk Bed hoặc Family Bunks With 4 Bunk Beds sẽ giúp mọi người có những trải nghiệm vui vẻ và tiện nghi. Ngoài ra, các phòng suite như Duplex Suite hay Executive Suite mang đến không gian rộng rãi lên tới 41-46 mét vuông, lý tưởng cho những kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt hoặc các chuyến công tác quan trọng.

Hòa Ninh - Nơi tĩnh lặng giữa lòng Đà Nẵng

Hòa Ninh là một khu vực yên bình và tĩnh lặng nằm giữa lòng thành phố Đà Nẵng sôi động. Với vẻ đẹp tự nhiên hùng vĩ và không gian thanh bình, Hòa Ninh là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trốn khỏi sự ồn ào và hối hả của cuộc sống đô thị.

Khu vực Hòa Ninh nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng chỉ khoảng 20 phút lái xe, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho du khách muốn khám phá cả hai mặt của thành phố này. Với khí hậu mát mẻ quanh năm và khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp, Hòa Ninh là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát.

Ngoài ra, Hòa Ninh cũng nằm gần các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng khác của Đà Nẵng như Bán đảo Sơn Trà, Cầu Rồng và Bãi biển Mỹ Khê. Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vùng đất này và trải nghiệm sự hòa quyện giữa thiên nhiên và văn hóa đặc trưng của Đà Nẵng.

Hướng dẫn đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills từ sân bay gần Đà Nẵng

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một điểm đến tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, và để đến đó từ sân bay, bạn có một số lựa chọn thuận tiện. Sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng là sân bay gần nhất, cách khoảng 35km từ Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Có một số phương tiện bạn có thể sử dụng để di chuyển từ sân bay đến đây.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Bạn có thể tìm các công ty taxi tại sân bay và đặt xe để đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Điều này đảm bảo rằng bạn sẽ có một hành trình thuận tiện và thoải mái. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn để đến nơi.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng để đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Xe buýt là một lựa chọn kinh tế và tiện lợi. Bạn có thể tìm hiểu về các tuyến xe buýt và lịch trình từ sân bay hoặc hỏi nhân viên tại quầy thông tin sân bay để biết thêm thông tin chi tiết về cách đi xe buýt từ sân bay đến khách sạn.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Nằm gần Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, du khách sẽ có cơ hội khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng tại Đà Nẵng. Ba Na Hills, một khu du lịch nổi tiếng, nằm cách khách sạn chỉ trong khoảng cách ngắn. Du khách có thể tận hưởng không khí mát mẻ và khám phá những công trình kiến trúc độc đáo tại đây. Một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua là Cầu Vàng, một cây cầu nổi tiếng với kiến trúc độc đáo và tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp. Du khách cũng có thể tham quan Bà Nà Hills, một khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng với cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp và các hoạt động giải trí thú vị.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng hấp dẫn như Beer Plaza, Arapang, Thien Dia Restaurant, La Lavande, Little Tokyo in Ba Na Hills, L'etable, La Pensee, Kavkaz, KUNGFU NOODLE RESTAURANT và Taiga restaurant. Với sự đa dạng về món ăn và phong cách, khách sạn này là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho du khách muốn khám phá ẩm thực đa quốc gia. Từ những món ăn phương Tây tinh tế cho đến ẩm thực Á Đông truyền thống, bạn có thể tìm thấy tất cả tại khu vực này. Hãy thưởng thức những món ăn ngon và trải nghiệm không gian ấm cúng của những nhà hàng xung quanh khách sạn.

Giá trung bình phòng tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills so với giá trung bình phòng tại Đà Nẵng

Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một trải nghiệm lưu trú đẳng cấp tại Đà Nẵng, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Với giá trung bình chỉ $134 mỗi đêm, bạn sẽ được tận hưởng một không gian sang trọng và tiện nghi tại khu nghỉ dưỡng này. So với giá trung bình phòng tại Đà Nẵng là $79, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills có giá hơi cao hơn, nhưng đáng đồng tiền bát gạo bởi sự hoàn hảo trong từng chi tiết.

Đánh giá khách hàng tích cực về Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Khách sạn này không chỉ có dịch vụ tốt mà còn có một không gian đẹp và lãng mạn. Phòng ốc sạch sẽ và thoải mái, nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Đặc biệt, khách hàng rất hài lòng với bữa sáng ngon và đa dạng. Khách sạn này còn có vị trí thuận tiện và gần gũi, mang lại sự tiện lợi cho khách hàng. Một số khách hàng còn nhấn mạnh về cảnh quan đẹp và hồ bơi tuyệt vời tại khách sạn. Tóm lại, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách khi đến Đà Nẵng.

Sự hài lòng của khách hàng với Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.7 trên 10. Khách hàng đánh giá cao sự hữu ích của dịch vụ này với điểm số 8.5 cho giá trị, 8.5 cho tiện nghi và 8.7 cho sự sạch sẽ. Đặc biệt, vị trí của khách sạn nhận được sự đánh giá cao nhất với điểm số 9.3. 

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi, cho phép du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận đến các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng ở Đà Nẵng. Với điểm số 9.3 cho vị trí, khách hàng đánh giá cao khả năng di chuyển thuận tiện từ khách sạn đến các địa điểm du lịch. 

Không chỉ vị trí thuận lợi mà khách sạn còn được đánh giá cao về hiệu suất của nhân viên. Với điểm số 8.7 cho hiệu suất nhân viên, khách hàng đã bày tỏ sự hài lòng với dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm của đội ngũ nhân viên tại khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Các nhân viên nhiệt tình và chu đáo sẽ đảm bảo du khách có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đà Nẵng.

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Nơi ở nằm ở vị trí thuận tiện, di chuyển dễ dàng. Nhân viên phục vụ tốt, thân thiện và chu đáo với khách. Phòng sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi, khiến cho cảm giác hợp lý với giá cả phải trả. Phù hợp cho những ai đang tìm kiếm một nơi nghỉ ngơi chất lượng cao và được chăm sóc chu đáo.
sample_comments.title: Dịch vụ tốt, sạch sẽ, giá trị hợp lý, vị trí tuyệt vời.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Ms. Sayvaree,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills would like to thank you and your group for choosing our Deluxe room for your stay, and for taking the time to write such a comprehensive and beautiful review.

We are absolutely thrilled to receive your perfect 10.0/10 rating! Reading your wonderful highlights---good service, clean, good value, and an excellent location---brings immense pride and joy to our entire team.

Our main goal is always to provide a seamless and impressive experience for our guests. We are delighted that you found our staff friendly and attentive, our rooms pristine and well-equipped, and our location convenient for your travels. Knowing that your stay felt like a true value for your investment is the best reward we could ever ask for.

Thank you once again for your kind words and your high recommendation for those seeking quality accommodation. We would be absolutely delighted to welcome you and your friends back to our village in the
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Khu nghỉ dưỡng đẹp, tiện lợi cho mọi di chuyển và tham quan các loại hình ở đây
sample_comments.negatives: Phòng nhỏ, hẹp, chật chội, không khí phòng cực kỳ ngột ngạt mặc dù đã bật máy lạnh, hoặc thậm chí mở toang cửa sổ. Khách mất ngủ cả đêm vì giường. cần xem lại loại nệm khách sạn đang sử dụng. Cả 5 ngừoi trong gia đình khách đi đều khó ngủ và mất ngủ vì loại nệm, này.

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.negatives: The front desk ladies aren't as friendly as I expected them to be (looking very serious) and are unable to answer simple questions back in English, however, the bellboys are great and helpful

sample_comments.text: Nằm trong vị trí có thời tiết rất tốt (đi vào đầu tháng 4) Thời tiết tuyệt vời, phòng sạch sẽ, bữa sáng của khách sạn được đánh giá là xuất sắc. Hương vị có thể không mạnh mẽ hoặc đậm đà nhưng có đa dạng đủ so với giá cả. Tuy nhiên, có rất nhiều người, ấn tượng với dịch vụ cáp treo và hệ thống phục vụ của khách sạn. Khá tiện lợi.
sample_comments.title: Địa điểm
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!

Dear Siriporn,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for your recent visit to the specific and only French village in Vietnam.

Thank you so much for another perfect 10/10 rating! We are thrilled to hear that your group enjoyed the excellent weather in early April and found our Family Bunks room clean and comfortable. It is wonderful to know that you were impressed with our breakfast variety, the convenience of our cable car system, and the overall service provided by our team.

We have also noted your comment about the breakfast area being busy. We constantly strive to manage guest flow during peak times to ensure a comfortable dining experience for everyone, and your feedback is very helpful in this regard.

Our staff works hard to ensure that every guest feels at home and well taken care of, so receiving such positive feedback is a huge encouragement for us. We truly appreciate your continued support and would be
sample_comments.room_type: Family Bunks with 4 bunk beds

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Không khí và kiến trúc của làng Pháp
sample_comments.negatives: Quá ồn ào, phòng không được cách âm, nhạc của các khu vui chơi bật to từ sáng đến tối kể cả giờ nghỉ trưa rất ức chế thần kinh và không thể nghỉ ngơi được

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.positives: It was beautiful place to be. My room had a decent view of the alley, it made me feel like a Disney princess. The bed was comfortable & somewhat clean.The guys who helped me move my luggages were really nice. Wonderful breakfast buffet with many choices!
sample_comments.negatives: The room was old and outdated. The receptionist girls look bored and hated their jobs. The bar in the hotel was so lame! The price I paid did not cover the capÂ¿s ticket to get to the mountain.

sample_comments.text: Khách sạn nằm trên một vị trí nổi bật, bao quanh bởi bầu không khí đẹp và ngay cả một công viên chủ đề với nhiều điểm tham quan, điều này khiến cho kỳ nghỉ trở nên độc đáo. Phòng khá thoải mái, với một nhà tắm riêng biệt tạo thêm sự tiện lợi. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, chủ động và cung cấp dịch vụ tuyệt vời trong suốt thời gian nghỉ. Mặc dù các tiện nghi có phần hạn chế và kích thước phòng không quá rộng rãi, nhưng mọi thứ vẫn được bố trí hợp lý và đầy đủ để mang đến một kỳ nghỉ dễ chịu.
sample_comments.title: Hàng hóa
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Pornnapa,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for your recent visit to the specific and only French village in Vietnam.

Thank you so much for your wonderful feedback! We're delighted to hear that you enjoyed our unique location, the beautiful surroundings, and the attentive service from our staff. Providing a clean, comfortable, and welcoming environment is always our top priority.

We also appreciate your comments regarding the facilities and room size. Your feedback is valuable and will help us continue improving our accommodations for a better guest experience.

We would be thrilled to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay. Please don't hesitate to reach out if there's anything we can do to make your next visit even more pleasant.

Best regards,
Guest Experience Department
sample_comments.room_type: Standard room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Ổn
sample_comments.positives: Dịch vụ tốt, anh Việt hỗ trợ hành lý nhiệt tình
sample_comments.negatives: Sàn toilet đọng nước cực lâu

sample_comments.text: Không gian yên tĩnh mát mẻ buổi tối có lửa nhạc và biễu diễn góp vui Kraft Beer ngon
sample_comments.title: Ki nghi đáng nhớ
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Chào bạn Giang,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills xin được gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành nhất đến bạn và nhóm của mình đã lựa chọn phòng Standard của khách sạn cho kỳ nghỉ vừa qua, cũng như đã dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận tuyệt vời này.

Tập thể khách sạn vô cùng tự hào và hạnh phúc khi nhận được điểm số tuyệt đối 10.0/10 từ bạn. Thật tuyệt vời khi biết rằng bạn đã có một "Kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ" tại làng Pháp trên mây, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng không gian yên tĩnh, mát mẻ đặc trưng của đỉnh Bà Nà khi đêm xuống.

Đặc biệt, chúng tôi rất vui khi hoạt động đốt lửa trại, biểu diễn âm nhạc và những ly bia tươi Kraft Beer đậm vị đã mang lại cho bạn cùng những người thân yêu những giây phút thư giãn, vui vẻ và trọn vẹn nhất. Việc mang đến một không gian trải nghiệm dịch vụ chỉn chu, mượt mà và tràn đầy năng lượng tích cực cho du khách luôn là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi.

Một lần nữa, xin cảm ơn những đánh giá tích cực của bạn. Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón bạn và
sample_comments.room_type: Standard room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được
sample_comments.positives: Vị trí
sample_comments.negatives: Phòng

sample_comments.title: Khong dang tien
sample_comments.text: Phong qua xau, gia rat mac so voi gia tri khach nhan duoc
sample_comments.room_type: Superior room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Do NOT stay at Mercure DaNang French Village Ba Na Hills
sample_comments.negatives: The room was advertised as "view of the mountains or surrounding village". My room was surrounded by the villagers. Crowds, tour groups, all understandably loud and excited steps from my deck/windows and theme park music blared from morning until 8pm, the speakers right outside my window. Impossible to enjoy room, which was modest for the premium price charged. Mini bar empty. Staff non-caring.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.negatives: The front desk ladies aren't as friendly as I expected them to be (looking very serious) and are unable to answer simple questions back in English, however, the bellboys are great and helpful

sample_comments.title: Te
sample_comments.text: Qua dat so voi chat luong dich vu nhan duoc
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Duc,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills xin gửi lời cảm ơn chân thành đến Quý khách vì đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại ngôi làng Pháp độc đáo duy nhất tại Việt Nam.

Cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ ý kiến. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng trải nghiệm của Quý khách chưa tương xứng với chi phí đã bỏ ra.

Xin Quý khách yên tâm rằng những góp ý này đã được chúng tôi ghi nhận và chuyển đến các bộ phận liên quan để xem xét và cải thiện. Chúng tôi luôn nỗ lực nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ nhằm mang lại trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho khách hàng.

Chúng tôi rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong tương lai với những cải thiện tích cực hơn. Nếu Quý khách cần hỗ trợ thêm, xin đừng ngần ngại liên hệ với chúng tôi.

Trân trọng,
Bộ phận Chăm sóc Khách hàng
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Rude staff. Stay away. Expensive for no value.
sample_comments.positives: Theme park.
sample_comments.negatives: Staff was very rude and lazy. They accused me of stealing nasty slippers. When I told them where they were, they pretended to look for them and told me they could not find them and made me look for them by myself. No apologies were given after showing them the slippers. All in all a terrible experience.

sample_comments.title: Do not stay here.
sample_comments.positives: The location was the only good thing here.
sample_comments.negatives: The service was below average, the food was terrible. We tried several places to eat but they all come from the mecure kitchen, which was terrible. The golden bridge was closed with no notice so after all the planning and cost of travel we were unable to see it at all.

sample_comments.title: Trải nghiệm cực kỳ tệ - sẽ không quay lại Mercure Bà Nà Hills
sample_comments.text:
Vì là khách sạn duy nhất trên Bà Nà nên chúng tôi không có lựa chọn khác. Tuy nhiên, trải nghiệm nhận được hoàn toàn không xứng đáng với giá tiền và tiêu chuẩn 4 sao.

1. Phòng ở
Phòng cũ kỹ, chật hẹp, cảm giác không sạch sẽ, cửa phòng cũ, view xấu. Giá phòng rất cao nhưng chất lượng hoàn toàn không tương xứng. Phòng còn thiếu xà phòng rửa tay, gọi dịch vụ phòng thì không ai nghe máy.

2. Dịch vụ & thái độ nhân viên (điểm trừ lớn nhất)

Nhân viên thiếu chuyên nghiệp, lạnh nhạt, gần như không hỗ trợ khách.

Không có ai hỗ trợ hành lý, không hướng dẫn đường đi.

Lễ tân không chào hỏi, thái độ thờ ơ, hỏi gì cũng rất miễn cưỡng.

Check-out, dùng cáp treo không hề được hướng dẫn.

Nhân viên khu ăn sáng mặt mũi cau có, không một nụ cười.

Email phản hồi cực kỳ chậm (1 tuần mới trả lời), trong khi các resort khác mùa cao điểm vẫn phản hồi trong ngày.
Không thể lấy lý do "mùa cao điểm" để biện minh cho dịch vụ kém như vậy.

3. Quy trình đón tiếp rất tệ

Khi check-in dưới chân núi, security bảo đợi xe trung chuyển nhưng đợi hơn 30 phút không có xe, dù liên lạc bộ đàm vẫn thông suốt.

Cuối cùng phải quá giang xe 16 chỗ, lên bãi xe thì tự xách hành lý nặng đi bộ lên dốc.

Lên tới khu khách sạn, quầy lễ tân đóng cửa, gọi điện thì bị hướng dẫn qua điện thoại đi tìm tòa nhà De Paris trong khi khách hoàn toàn không quen địa hình.

Hỏi quầy thông tin cũng không ai biết, không một nhân viên nào dẫn đường. Khách phải tự mò mẫm tìm khách sạn giữa khu du lịch rộng lớn.

4. Tiện ích & ăn sáng

Wifi yếu (có thể thông cảm vì trên núi).

Buffet sáng ít món, không ngon, không đa dạng.

5. Giá cả
Giá phòng đắt gấp 2-3 lần khách sạn bình thường, nhưng chất lượng phòng và dịch vụ thua xa nhiều khách sạn giá rẻ. Hoàn toàn không đáng tiền.

Kết luận
Chỉ vì là khách sạn duy nhất trên Bà Nà không có nghĩa là muốn phục vụ khách thế nào cũng được. Khách bỏ tiền để nghỉ dưỡng chứ không phải để tự phục vụ mọi thứ.
Ban quản lý và đội ngũ nhân sự nên xem xét lại toàn bộ cách vận hành và đào tạo nhân viên.

Mọi người nên cân nhắc kỹ trước khi đặt phòng tại đây.

Chào bạn Minh,

Rất cảm ơn bạn đã dành thời gian phản hồi chi tiết về trải nghiệm của mình, dù chúng tôi vô cùng lấy làm tiếc và thực sự trăn trở khi đọc được những dòng chia sẻ này. sample_comments.title: Worst stay ever
sample_comments.text:
I was extremely disappointed with my stay at Mercure Ba Na Hills --- it felt nowhere near the 4-star experience it claims to be. 

+1

 Confusing & Frustrating Check-In
• After doing online check-in, I still had to queue at the Ba Na Hills cable car station to check in again --- with no clear instructions beforehand. 

• Once at the hotel reception, there was another waiting line and no fast-track for guests. It was chaotic and inefficient. 

 Poor Communication & Extra Charges
• I booked what I thought was a family room, but was charged extra for my child --- a fee that wasn't disclosed clearly at booking. 

• English language skills among staff were limited, and basic communication felt like a struggle. 

 Rude, Unhelpful Staff
• Front desk service was rushed and disinterested --- not remotely welcoming. 

• At the restaurant buffet, staff pushed us for the bill before we finished eating, which felt rude and dismissive. 

 Room Issues & Hygiene Problems
• The carpet in our room had a strong smell and lighting was so dim we needed a flashlight. 

• I found non-disposable slippers in the wardrobe that stank --- extremely unhygienic. 

• Rooms seemed small, damp, and outdated compared with what was advertised. 
trip.com

 Noise & Misleading Amenities
• Some reviewers reported constant noise from nearby attractions and confusion about hotel buildings --- making rest difficult. 

• Contrary to some listings, the supposed "hotel pool" isn't on site but at another building far away. 

 Overall Feel
This hotel feels overpriced for what you actually get. Between the chaotic check-in, unprofessional service, extra surprise charges, and hygiene concerns, I would not stay here again --- especially if you expect a relaxing, true 4-star mountain hotel experience

sample_comments.title: terrible experience at this hotel and would not recommend staying here to anyone. The outdated room, broken safe, and la
sample_comments.positives: amusement park
sample_comments.negatives: accommodation so shabby and musty. my card was charged beforehand though booking clearly states "pay at the property". we have to find our own way to the hotel carrying our luggages . no information from staff on check in like for example " different station to go on departure", they just emphasized that check out is at 10am. reception staff are not proactive.

sample_comments.title: Bad
sample_comments.text:
My hopes where high when i arrived at the reception. looked great and nice. This soon changed when we got up the mointain which wasnt exactly a short trip.

Once we finaly arrived at the village, there was not a single soul to point us to a reception. nothing was mapped or pointed out. after a bit of wamdering around we finaly where able to find the frond desk.
there it seemed like an eternity to finaly get to our rooms. no staff what so ever. after standing there what felt like 30 min. finaly someon3 showed up to bring us to our rooms. where the horror continued. it was cold amd rainy so we wanted to take a shower. no hot water... great. So we went to the swimmingpool to warm up. it was only 25 or so degrees. not very nice to relax in after a flight. so we went back to our rooms. where they suposedly repaired the hot water. what they eventualy did. but it took about 10 minutes of running water to get warm, talk about waste full.

on to the dinner, atleat what was suposed to be dinner. Everything was cold,bland, flavourless and just outright awefull. overcooked cold steak, rubbery shrimp, cold rice, gruwelsome spagghetti, cold chicken. to sumise, ive had food from shady foodstalls that was ten times better then this.

to conclude, not worth your money in the slightest.

ps met another guy who had been staying here a while longer. his literal words where ;" I feel like a prisoner here". he had the same amd even worse experience seeing how je went to one of the bar/restaurants. where all of them have a 30% service fee. so over the already overpriced food you get the joy of spending even more.

pps sorry for the bad english, not a native speaker. and i've never submitted any reviews. but i want to prevent other ppl from making this mistake
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, xin chào!
Dear Wiley,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience, especially as this is your first review. We are truly sorry and deeply embarrassed that your stay was so distressing. To hear that a guest felt like a "prisoner" is heart-breaking and certainly not the magical experience we aim to provide on Ba Na Hills.

Please accept our sincerest apologies for the following failures:

Arrival & Navigation: We are sorry that you were left to wander the village without guidance. The French Village is expansive, and we clearly failed in our duty to provide proper signage or staff presence at the arrival points to lead you to the front desk.

Room & Facilities: It is unacceptable that you arrived to a room with no hot water during cold, rainy weather. Furthermore, we regret that our swimming pool temperature was not sufficient to offer you the relaxation you needed after your flight. We have alerted our Engineering team to review the water heating systems and pool te

sample_comments.title: AVOID AT ALL COSTS
sample_comments.text: We checked out early. The rooms are so dusty and bed sheets were stained. There is nothing there.. shops all close by 4pm. only few dining options. No minimart whatsoever open past 4pm once the last of tourists leave. Also, the cable cars stop operation at 5pm, so really, there's nothing you can do. except walk around the compound to closed shops. took 2 hours to check in.. by the time we got our room, it was 4pm+ and too late to take the cable cars down and back up. was trouble finding dining options, considering we didnt have lunch either before coming up the hills. we didnt drink their minibar items but they insisted we did. Until i showed them a picture on my phone and then they backed down their claims. HORRENDOUS. the rooms were so dusty!!! cleaning needs to be improved. We had dustmites bite us the whole night.. head to toe we were itching uncontrollably. Also.. the room is not "clean".. there are entities living in there. Please do not be fooled. There are no mountain views from the rooms. it faces the church or another stone building. You're most likely gonna be in the Pairs hotel, near the cable car drop off point. with loud music blasting. Need an umbrella? They tell you go back up to your room.. cos they kept in the wardrobe there. never again! We had no choice but stay 1 night cos the cable cars were not in operation in the evening. We checked out the next day ASAP. NEVER AGAIN!

sample_comments.title: Go for a day, don't bother staying overnight.
sample_comments.positives: The French town is beautiful at night. The lobby of the Mercure is lovely & the staff are great. If you're staying here to go to the golden bridge early, I recommend saving your money & not doing that. There were more people hogging the bridge when we went at 6:15 then there were at 7:30 when regular patrons could arrive. We got better photos at 7:30 with less people in them (maybe it was just the nature of the other people on the 6:15am gondola, I'm not sure)
sample_comments.negatives:
There was a really loud party above our room all night & we were woken up in the middle of the night to what sounded like them sliding chairs & tables. 
The rooms are teeny tiny & extremely outdated for the price.
The hallways stunk like a mix between cigarette, urine & food.
The food in the whole place was below average & extremely expensive as all the other reviews say.

sample_comments.text:
The worst stay and downgraded without being noticed when check in.
If we were well informed that there is nothing to enjoy due to the heavy rain and fog, we should not have paid and checked in down at the foot of the mountain. They were greedy to accommodante the fooled customers during the stormy season in their prison-like mountain. They kindly 'offered' all the peopl for the dinner as if they are the bénéficier but think about it, 1 meter away cannot be seen due to fog, Wherelse you can eat in that prison ?! 
They promised to refund but the refund amount has never made. Seems like they cancelled the refund after having given us the refund slip.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Firstly, we would like to thank you for choosing our hotel as one of the hotel in your trip to Da Nang.

We felt so sorry that your arrival date unfortunately met the typhoon Damrey, it was one of the worst in Vietnam and completely flooded the whole central Vietnam, our hotel and operations were badly affected too. We did apologize for any inconvenience might cause you during your stay.

Regarding to your refund issue, we will contact you directly through email to find out more information for our investigation.

It is always a pleasure to receive feedback which I will share with my team. I am sure that this feedback will continue to encourage our team to seek improvement and identify ways we can make our guests stay enjoyable.

Warm Regards,

Hotel Management

sample_comments.title: Nice faux French Village for the selfie-obsessed. Horrible, traumatic hotel staff service.
sample_comments.positives: Cuisine choices, generous buffets, entertaining shows, nice aspirational European theme, cable cars look well maintained. Overall, this Europe themed amusement park was eye candy. It would be more fun if the service of the hotel staff were welcoming.
sample_comments.negatives:
Guests, beware! 
I chose PAY AT PROPERTY, which is a higher rate. I sent a message to remind the hotel that I am paying in cash at check-in, which is what PAY AT PROPERTY means. When we arrived, I was informed that my credit card had already been charged more than 24 hours before the agreed check-in time. I FEEL SCAMMED. The hotel told me that if i prefer refund that I can get my money in as long as 30 days. We were forced to accept a higher charge for advance charge to my card because they couldn't promise a quicker refund date. Had I known that they operate like this, I would've chosen to just pay in advance at a lower rate. All the arguments at check-in really destroyed the mood for our stay. We negotiated for early check-in to make up for their mistake (which the manager admitted) and had to beg for it! When she agreed and we went to the satellite office near our actual hotel building, the receptionist told us no rooms are ready. Made us wait. And then much later in the day, the hotel sent us 2 plates of fruit as apology. We didn't touch it. Who knows if they all sneezed on it because we were difficult and I threatened to give a bad review? Fruit? They gave us fruit for the inconvenience and the higher rate charged to my card the day before I check-in. Isn't this illegal? Booking.com should sanction this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is good and the location is nice, but the incident that happened made my stay stressful and took away the enjoyment of my rest.
sample_comments.negatives:
My mother and I were staying in a connecting room. We heard someone trying to open the door from the other side. At first, we thought it might just be a child playing, so we didn't think much of it. We believed that as long as we didn't unlock our side, no one would be able to enter our room.

About 20 minutes later, we heard people talking outside the room. Suddenly, our door was opened. Thankfully, the safety latch was on, so the door could not be opened fully. I quickly put on some clothes and asked how they were able to open our door and how they had a key card.

The guest next door said their friend had mistaken the room number and asked the staff to open the door. What I don't understand is why, when the staff realized they had opened the wrong room, they didn't stay to explain the situation to us. They simply opened the door and walked away, leaving the guests to sort it out themselves.

I called the front desk, and they only said that yes, the door had been opened by mistake. I did not hear any apology at all for what happened.

After this incident, I could not sleep for the rest of the night. I kept staring at the door the whole time. Thankfully, we were staying for only one night.

The hotel should have better security systems in place. Doors should not be opened for just anyone without proper verification. This situation made us feel very unsafe.

We deeply regret that your stay did not meet your expectations and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a much better experience.

Best regards,
Kayden

sample_comments.negatives: The check out time is much earlier than in most of the hotels. In this hotel you have to check out at 10:30 am. So, considering normal check in at 14:00, it's a short stay. Also, breakfast buffet is very bad, food is extremely bad, sorry. There's a nicer restaurant in Marseille hotel, better eat there (we stayed at Paris hotel). Also, the rooms are very dark, even if we had a window, there's not enough light in a room, very dark.

sample_comments.text: It was so pathetic stay experience at hotel Mercure . Staff is so bad , they are not at all tourist friendly, they are so lost and busy . Toilet at reception was stinking , bell boys were not available to pick up the luggage , the room was so stuffy and there were half of electric points not working ...AC was not working . They gave us a fan to be able to sleep ....never expected this hospitality with such premium expensive branded hotel ...only and only good part was that we were able to take good picture in morning and night after crowds left ....overall not recommended.Hotel management need to train the staff t be able to handle foreigners.

Bonjour, xin chào!
Dear Ritu,

Thank you for sharing your candid feedback regarding your stay. We are deeply saddened to read about your experience and sincerely apologize for the series of challenges you faced with your family. It is clear that we fell far short of the high standards of hospitality we strive to provide at Mercure.

We are particularly concerned to hear about the issues with the electrical points and the air conditioning. While our mountain location can occasionally present technical challenges, providing a fan as a substitute for a functional AC is not the level of service we aim for. Please be assured that our engineering team is investigating the maintenance of that specific Attic room to ensure these issues are resolved immediately.

Furthermore, we regret that our service did not feel welcoming or attentive. We take your comments about staff training and the availability of bell staff very seriously. We will be reviewing these points with our department heads to e
sample_comments.room_type: Attic room with Twin Beds - No view

sample_comments.title: Rubbish covered in gold and jade
sample_comments.positives:
I booked two rooms for my family---one dorm room and one double room. The dorm room was on the 2nd floor and had large windows, which was great. However, the double room was on the 5th floor and lacked big windows, making it feel quite humid.

The hotel is located inside Ba Na Hills, which was a major advantage. Staying here meant we didn't have to deal with crowds of tourists while taking pictures and enjoying the beautiful architecture.

Dinner and breakfast were served as a buffet with a wide variety of options.
sample_comments.negatives:
- Location: Although the accommodation is inside the park, we found it very difficult to locate the building. There are 5-6 buildings serving as accommodations, and you only find out which one you'll stay in upon arrival---I wasn't informed even after my booking was confirmed.
- Management: I noticed a lack of staff and poor SOPs, though this might have been due to the peak season (Lunar New Year). When we arrived at the hill, a staff member personally handled all our luggage and guided us to a separate building (not the one we were staying in) to store our bags and wait until the 2 PM check-in. This process took him 10-20 minutes just to assist us. While I really appreciated his help, I couldn't help but wonder if this was an efficient approach. At check-in, another staff member simply gave us the room key and directions to our building. However, despite following his instructions, we still got lost because there were no signs along the streets. Additionally, there was no receptionist in any of the accommodation buildings. For check-out, we had to wait 20 minutes for them to confirm our rooms were in order before we were allowed to leave---quite a long time, especially for a 5-star hotel.
- Facilities: The building itself is beautiful, but the facilities inside are poorly maintained. For example, our bunk beds were squeaky and unstable.
- Customer Service: The staff at the buffet restaurant were impolite and unprofessional. We unknowingly chose a table next to a frequently used door, assuming it wouldn't be in use since there were many doors in the restaurant and most were not. However, people kept coming in and out through that door, making our dinner uncomfortable, and the draft from outside added to the inconvenience. When we raised the issue with a manager, he simply told us that the door was meant for entry and exit and asked us to move to another table. The real question is---why place a table there in the first place?

sample_comments.title: Pathetic and Awful experience
sample_comments.text: We booked for one night stay in Mercure Danang and had a terrible experience. We booked a family room with a bunk bed and our kids were so excited to be in that room until we discovered that the whole ceiling and wall near the bunk bed was badly leaking. There was water in the whole room within an hour and our luggage was about to get wet. We called reception and they took their own sweet time to send someone to check. After that they asked us to change our room to a duplex which had ac trouble. It was so hot in the room that we had to call them twice to check the fault in ac. Ultimately, nothing worked and we were so tired with cranky kids that we decided to just close our eyes and get through the night. It was actually a nightmare for us. Never ever recommending this hotel to stay.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!
Dear Varsha,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear about the issues you encountered during your stay with us. This is certainly not the experience we wish to provide to our guests, especially for families who are excited to enjoy their time with us.

We sincerely apologize for the water leakage in your room and the inconvenience this caused. We also regret that the air conditioning in your new room was not functioning properly, and we understand how frustrating this must have been, especially after such an exhausting day.

Please be assured that we take these matters very seriously. Our team is currently reviewing the situation to ensure that these issues do not occur again in the future, and that we provide a prompt and efficient response to any concerns that arise.

Your feedback is invaluable, and we will be using it to improve our services. We deeply regret that we were unable to meet your expectations, and we hope you will reconsider s
sample_comments.room_type: Family Deluxe with 1 King bed and 1 Bunk Bed

sample_comments.title: This experience is not for everyone. We are glad we went to bana hills but the expense of staying at the hotel up there
sample_comments.positives: Nice enough property
sample_comments.negatives: We went at a bad time maybe because of tete? All the restaurants were closed in the evening except for 2 which didn't appeal to us. No fault of the hotels, but everything was completely clouded over. We couldn't see our hands in front of our faces so we couldn't really fully appreciate the architecture and attractions. We also found the staff a bit lacking in their customer service skills.

sample_comments.title: Bad experience
sample_comments.text:
Everything in the room is spoilt. First, the TV can't on. Called the reception and waited for an hour for someone to fix but no one came. Called another time and waited for 15min to have someone to fix the TV remote.
Next, found out that the room heater was spoilt. Called for the reception, someone came to fix but to no avail. Told me to wait for him to get a replacement unit. Waited for sometime , came back with another faulty unit. Told me to wait for another unit. Waited for an hour, never returned. Called the reception again and they got another person to fix. Already told them the unit is faulty yet still came to check and asked mi to wait for another replacement. Finally gt a good unit after like 3hours.
Next, was the safe box. Wanted to keep my valuables inside and realized it kept prompting error. Called the reception again and finally gt it fix.. horrible service. Definitely not recommended!!
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!
Dear Elin,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. We are pleased that you enjoyed the convenient location at Ba Na Hills and the variety of options at our breakfast buffet. However, we regret that your room did not meet expectations in terms of comfort, particularly with the issues related to the heater and room condition. Please accept our sincerest apologies for the discomfort this caused during your stay.

We are committed to maintaining the highest standards of quality and will immediately address the room's condition and heating system to ensure this does not happen again. Your feedback regarding the food pricing is also valuable, and we will review it to ensure it aligns with the overall experience we wish to offer.

Thank you for bringing these concerns to our attention. We truly appreciate your feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back to offer a more comfortable and enjoyable stay.

Best regards,
Guest Experience Team
sample_comments.room_type: Family Deluxe with 1 King bed and 1 Bunk Bed

sample_comments.title: Only worth it for crowd free early access to golden bridge. Leave ASAP after bridge
sample_comments.positives: Best location. Can go to golden bridge before others at 6am and have nice pictures. Room was cozy, good shower bed etc
sample_comments.negatives:
Many things I didn't like. The food (as mentioned in comments) was average/ less than average. The "pool spa jacuzzi" was a joke. Jacuzzi was not even hot, the pool was completely empty (clearly other guests were not intrigued)
Overall they are very unorganized. We only received 1'day of vouchers for breakfast for our 3 night stay. They said "go to the reception to get more". we tried many times to go to reception and no one was there. We used a phone that it says to call if we need help. We called and told them we need breakfast vouchers. They said they will be there in 5 minutes. Girlfriend waited 20 minutes and finally left becusss no one showed up. For Vietnam this hotel is "expensive" 1 night is the same cost as a 5 star hotel for 2-3 nights in da nang. And this felt like a very average to below average hotel. They also double charged me for my reservation and to check out it took 20 minutes because of this confusion.

sample_comments.title: Worse service
sample_comments.text:
The receptionists are terrible, I stayed one night 23/11/2024, the room heater doesn't work, called for assistance at 5 pm a receptionists said will send engineer in 15 mins, no one arrived after 30 mins call again said will arrive in 10 mins, 7 pm went to lobby ask the guy receptionist said sorry will send engineer go in 10 mins. Waited in room after 20 mins called again the girl hang up my call. 

If there is no engineer, can just tell the truth, why let the guest wait.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Nang,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback, and we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during your stay. It's deeply concerning to hear about the delays in addressing your issue with the room heater and the lack of communication from our staff. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide.

Please know that your comments have been escalated to the relevant department for further investigation, and we are taking steps to ensure this does not happen again in the future.

sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with Twin Beds

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Good location
sample_comments.negatives: Room was so small

sample_comments.title: Claustrophobic room with barely any aircon
sample_comments.text:
We booked a Family Superior room that comes with a bunk bed and which only looked spacious on photos. There was just a tiny window facing the courtyard and it was very noisy at night. Felt rather claustrophobic. Secondly, the aircon is a centralised one so you can't adjust the temperature which was at 25degrees. At night it was very warm and my children kept waking up from the heat. The fan is fixed on just 1 mode and can't be adjusted. Imagine how stuffy it was that we resorted to opening the tiny window for some air. Guess what, we got bitten by mosquitos. We needed more water as the 4 bottled water was insufficient for our family of 5. We were asked to pay 52 000 vnd per bottle when it was sold for 25000 vnd downstairs. Obviously we chose to purchase it downstairs.

Upon checkout, we were told that the reception downtown he hill had undercharged us for tickets and wanted us to top up. We insisted that we did not underpay after checking our credit card bill. After a prolong period of checking and they showed us the bill which we apparently paid, it was not even our room! 

Will we come back again? The answer is obvious. If any, a day trip to Bana Hill will suffice.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!
Dear Eileen, 

I apologize for the issues you encountered during your stay. We regret that the room did not meet your expectations in terms of size and comfort, and we apologize for the inconvenience caused by the noise, air conditioning, and billing confusion.

Your feedback is invaluable, and we are addressing these issues to improve our services. If you reconsider staying with us in the future, please contact me directly, and I will ensure a more pleasant experience for you and your family.

Thank you for bringing these matters to our attention.

Best regards,
Guest Experience Department
sample_comments.room_type: Family Deluxe with 1 King bed and 1 Bunk Bed

sample_comments.title: Definitely, a 3 star hotel.

sample_comments.title: One of the worst experiences
sample_comments.text:
Firstly, Customer service was very unhelpful during checkin process. While we got there a hour earlier, the staff at the counter just rudely pointed us away without even checking on the system when the room could be made available.
 
Secondly, they provided a standard room in place of the deluxe room that we had booked on Agoda. Later on at night when we called them to confirm, they replied very late that they are okay to move us to a deluxe room at the time when we were about to sleep. 

They take full advantage of having a monopoly in the area. They mention complimentary water on the website yet they charge ridiculously 52000 vnd for a single bottle of water knowing we can't buy it from anywhere else. Such a loot is not expected for a basic thing like water from the Mercure. 

Rooms were very dirty and not well maintained. Looked like they lack staff. For breakfast, very few options for vegetarians. 

Overall, not a good experience - would rate it very poorly for anyone looking for a restful holiday. Best avoid this one.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Hemang,
Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hill would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for your recent visit to the specific and only French village in Vietnam. On behalf of the Mercure Danang French Village Ba Na Hills staff, I would like to express my deep regret for the negative experience about additional charge for extra water and accommodation you encountered during your stay. we fell short in delivering the quality service that you expected. 

Please accept our apologies for the shortcomings. Your feedback offers us a chance to reflect and improve, and we hope that we can deliver a better experience in the future. We hope you will reconsider and give us the opportunity to change your opinion about our hotel.

Best regards,
Guest Experience Department

sample_comments.text:
Total waste of money . 
Rooms are very small and prices too high & dangerous beams inside the rooms, I got very badly hurt. 
Absolute advantage of Monopoly. 
Total misinformation that cable cars are not available after evening by authorities to sell the rooms to people who want to see BaNa hills by night. 
Actually you can get a cable car as late as 9.00pm to get back to Danang city. 
You can enjoy Bana hills night lighting till late evening, & go back to your hotel in Danang. 
This will spare you from packing and unpacking, save you money by not staying at this hotel 
&
Sunrise view from Golden Bridge is nothing great, instead you can go in the evening when the crowd is very less and enjoy the Golden bridge. 
By giving wrong information of cable car availability, this hotel is selling rooms for night stay.

sample_comments.title: Not for everyone
sample_comments.text:
Hello, 
As a neurodivergent couple we struggled with not losing it during our short time there. 

We arrived to inclement weather. We were forced like cattle through every check point and venue in the resort. The music was too intense and they didn't stop playing it all through the evening. 

The room we were provided was next to the elevator, the entryway and we heard everything. It was horrendous. 

It took us over a half hour to find our hotel. The signage is non existent and the map is pretty bad. When we checked in they refused to give us two room keys. This meant that the lights, the heat and the power to the room was shut down if we left. 

The restaurants are really bad. They're out of menu items, they're out of beer, and the quality of the food is bad for the price you have paid. 

If you want chaos, this is your place. 
You cannot escape the music being blasted everywhere, the crowds and the hordes of selfish people who need their pictures taken all over. The lack of self awareness is bad. 

The travel videos are definitely editing out anything negative.

Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Mr. Kevin,

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills would like to sincerely thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your recent stay.

We are truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations and that several aspects of your visit caused discomfort. We understand how factors such as crowded areas, noise levels, room location, and signage challenges could impact your stay, especially as a neurodivergent couple. Please know that your comments are taken very seriously, and we are reviewing them carefully to improve our guest experience.

Our goal is always to provide a welcoming, comfortable, and enjoyable environment for all guests. We regret that we fell short during your visit and appreciate your honest feedback, as it helps us identify areas where we need to make meaningful improvements.

We hope that, despite these challenges, you may consider giving us another opportunity in the future to provide a stay that better aligns with you

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives:
The cable car and the view are the best things to do. The castles and the other constructions look super artificial it's a Disneyland without the fun.
The pizza restaurant open during day time was the "best" food we had during our stay in bana hills even though expensive and small sized pizza.
sample_comments.negatives:
1-The hôtel : we did not get the room we booked the decoration was completely different (see picture) and we had a view on a metallic structure instead of a mountain view, airport transfer never came and the GM had to offer us his car instead. Apparently the afternoon receptionist didn't even bother enter ou transfer in the system since in the morning the shift receptionist wanted us to pay for it even though payment was already done the day before.
2- The food was way overpriced and not good menus in the restaurant do not include a description of the dish wich is not the norm so basically they can make any recipe they want and tell you this is how it's done (caesar salad with bacon instead of anchovies or chicken), the gnocci sauce was terribly acid.
3- the staff spoke very little english and for instance we had issues explaining our opinion regarding the food taste (they could not understand the word "acid" even translated with google), same for the rest of the small restaurants outside the hotel.
Also no reactivity and no answer from the property when asked a few questions regarding our arrival using booking app messages, answers came only after we left.

Personally I don't think bana hills deserve to spend one night on site, a day is way enough for a tour. Many attractions were closed (the most interesting ones).

sample_comments.title: great location but very uncomfortable environment for relaxation
sample_comments.positives:
rooms: tiny, dark, outdated, beds are not comfortable, certain areas are old and some are warm, very uncomfortable
breakfast: very bad selection of food and not quality meals
location: great location but extremely noisy inside and outside the rooms. The hotel was having construction work and never told me about it. the bar played inappropriate loud music i could hear from the windows. very uncomfortable and very noisy. zero relaxation at this hotel
sample_comments.negatives: the hotel is very outdated and uncomfortable for the price. I will not want to stay again. the noise, specifically, never stopped! they should have asked the quests if they would prefer quite rooms or party rooms. Had I known about this issue, I would never want to stay here.

sample_comments.title: 5 stars hotel without 5 stars service
sample_comments.text:
It's the only accommodation available at Bana Hills. Advantage of staying overnight was for the early morning access to golden hand bridge before the crowd; and the night view of the French village. 

Golden hours to golden hand bridge:
- hotel guest can take the earliest cable car from French village to mid hill (6am, 6:30am or 7am). However, the earliest ride back to French village is 7am. 

Not the 1st time staying, and this hotel is really old. Room dusty, toilet has slight sewerage smell. Despite the closure during Covid, hotel did not upgrade nor kept good maintenance. Breakfast is a war zone. 

after all the fun, be prepare for nightmare. Hotel just told us to join the queue to go down the hill. Super long queue (at least >2hr waiting time) where day visitors are taking the cable car ride down. This is ridiculous - hotel website and booking clearly stated that hotel guest are taking the cable car ride from different station. 

an unpleasant and unhappy experience that the hotel staff is more attentive to the local Vietnamese vs foreigner. Saw another group of Vietnamese hotel guest who did not even request and was automatically brought to the other cable car (no queue, basically nobody in the line at all) for the ride down the hill.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!
Dear Lanjun,
Warmest greetings from Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills!

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your stay and glad that you enjoyed.We appreciate your comments so we can improve and serve you better next time. Our hotel will grow more and more in the future, in order to serve well. We hope that you will come back to the hotel in the future and hope that you can introduce our hotel to your friends.

Best regards.
Hung Nguyen (Mr.)
Guest Experience Manager.

sample_comments.positives: Nice set up and clean. The beds are very comfortable.

sample_comments.title: The service was not good
sample_comments.text:
When we checked in to the first Reception before the Cable car, there is no support on Cable car check in although we travel family with kids and big suitcases. We was told there is hotel staff receive us when Cable car arrive but no one there when we arrived. Then we need to carry our luggage from the cable station to Reception and then from Reception to the hotel area on uphill, rocky roads. When we check out, we ask for luggage support, hotel staff asked if we have many, until we say we have many and booked yesterday, our request then accepted. 

Car booked at Reception was not properly recorded until reconfirm second day, payment was not properly record as well. We have already paid the rental car when check out but when we reach Concierge, we being asked to pay again. We book a hotel car but the actual car is from a third party and the driver don't know anything about our booking. 

Cleaning is another issue. Food and personal stuff of previous guest still in the room
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for your reply. We sincerely apologize that your stay at our hotel did not meet your expectation.
At Mercure, we strive to provide a superior service experience for every customer; therefore your feedback is very important to us. Please rest assured that we are taking the appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence.
We appreciate your sharing your concerns, and it is our hope that you will give us the opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Regards,
Hotel Management team

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Hotel location, decor.
sample_comments.negatives: Noisy room, some equipments was not up to standard.

sample_comments.title: Bad name for the Mercure brand
sample_comments.text:
I stayed at Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills last year and had a wonderful experience. This time it was a complete opposite, It was horrible. 

First, this time the hotel will nickel and dime you for everything. Last year I book this hotel, the cable car ride to get to the hotel was free, this time I had to pay 800 thousand VND to get to the hotel. Bell boy charged me 100K for 2 extra bottles of water for my room. I asked for ice, front desk directed me to the bar and the bar told me I have to order a drink in order to get ice. I ordered a coke and got exactly 3 cubes of ice. 

This place is vastly understaff this time which shows in the way they treated customers. I asked for utensils in the hotel restaurant, the staff bluntly said "Go over there and get it". I've stayed at 2-star hotel that showed much more professionalism than this 4-star hotel. 

Much more to be said why my stay was horribly bad but not enough space allowed by Agoda in this review
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for choosing Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills and taking the time to share the experience following your stay with us.

As we always strive to ensure our guests experience the best visit possible during their travel so I am regretful for the shortfalls mentioned due to miscommunication. Please accept my sincere apology for the inconvenience caused and rest assured that we have taken appropriate measures to address the problem and prevent future occurrence. 

Besides, I would like to share with you that cable car ticket is normally not included in hotel bookings except some promotion packages. If you would like to include cable car ticket in your hotel booking, please contact direct our reservations for more information.

We appreciate your contributed feedback, and hope that you will give us an opportunity to better serve you in the near future.

Sincerely,
Hotel management.

sample_comments.positives: Location for sure!
sample_comments.negatives:
Rooms a bit outdated, need some work.
Fridge didn't work and there was nothing in there anyway.
Walls seem made out of paper, you car hear everything around the other rooms or corridor.
Power outlets are the worst, they don't hold the plugs in place.
Breakfast buffet is a mess, they don't take you to the table so first come first serve, there was not enough coffee cups, machines not working and overall very asian focus although it was supposed to be international.

Nothing to see...no where to go.
Don't waist tim and money

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: We liked the atmosphere and location.
sample_comments.negatives: The staff always seemed so busy and unwilling to help. In the middle of the night there seemed to be a power cut and we had unexpected lighting in the room.

sample_comments.title: Good Location with incompetent staff and horrible services
sample_comments.text:
This is my first ever bad review on a hotel(been to other top destinations and have stayed mostly in top rated hotels, was never disappointed. 
This one was such a huge disappointment! Location is their only selling point, everything else is based on your tolerance level. 
Overall, the staff are having a lackluster attitude in serving tourists. Two checkin points to reach the hotel even after fully paid and confirmed reservation. Each checkin point took 50 minutes to 1 hour. I saw families with elders and young kids suffering to accommodate their family during this endless checking process. Even the local guests started fighting with the staff asking what was the need to make everyone wait for an hour even after a fully paid, confirmed reservation. No drinking water was available around unless you carried your own water bottle. This was all just checkin point-1. Checkin point 2 was even more horrible as they were extremely short staffed, no directions as to what is the next step, no help with getting a bell boy. You literally have to run behind bell boys and get hold of them to take your luggage back to the hotel. 
No clear instructions about travelling in cable car for people with lot of luggage. They just throw in the luggage and push you inside and slam the door. Not for the weak hearted or old people. 
I will visit Ba na hills again as a day trip but will not stay in this hotel.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.positives: Location is beautiful with amazing view outside on the top of the Ba Na Mountains. Because it is special to get there by the cable car. There was good weather in the morning. In addition, it feel good by magnificent buildings with cobblestone streets when I walked around.
sample_comments.negatives: The space of the room is designed unreasonable, that led to uncomfortable when using. Because the bathroom, toilet and sink are separate and take up very much space in the room, but they have open space with the bedroom, that led to discomfort when I used and when my roommate used it. In addition, I was woken up at night because of the unpleasant smell from the toilet. Furthermore, the soundproofing of the room is not good so there is a noise from the next room, even though the dividing wall seems very thick. On the top of that there was always bad smell in the elevator lobby and in the elevator.

sample_comments.title: A black mark, not a good value for money
sample_comments.positives: Not that many positives about the room itself, but the breakfast was great and the hotel was conveniently located within the theme park.
sample_comments.negatives:
We were located in a connected room on the bottom floor, which means we could hear everything happening around us (including people walking by our windows outside). The room itself wanted to look old-fashioned European, but the style was inaccurate. Bathroom was also disappointing, it did not have a separate area for showering, just a wet room. Bed was not that comfy either.

Which brings me to the overall quality/cost ratio - this room was way over-priced for the quality of leisure it offered. It felt the hotel knew they could get away with lower-standard rooms because tourists are willing to pay anything just to be in Ba Na Hills.

My husband got sick off the food from buffet dinner and the breakfast was meh. We were so excited for this stay during our time in Vietnam, and this ended being the worst experience. Severely disappointed, save your money.

sample_comments.title: So so
sample_comments.text: If you just wanna visit BaNa Hill maybe I suggest you to go there early in the morning instead of stay there over night. Some of the staff really not very helpful. I forgotten to bring my coat and the hill top is very cold. I asked for a pass for the cable car to get down to get my coat but at first I was told I need to present my physical passport as I am staying locally so I only have my passport photo on my phone. I was told that they cannot give me the cable car pass if I can't provide them my physical passport and it is their company policy. Then why can I check in the hotel with just photo of my passport? Isn't it funny. I have a booking with the hotel and they have all my details yet unable to provide a cable pass? Really not very helpful. Maybe they want you to pay for the ride again?

We understand how inconvenient it must have been to face difficulty getting a cable car pass, especially given the cold weather. Your concerns have been noted, and we will review our processes to ensure clearer communication and more flexibility where possible.

sample_comments.room_type: Standard room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Good location, nice view but too small restroom.
sample_comments.positives: Good location, cable cars, good place and good view, very good weather, nice staffs
sample_comments.negatives: Too small restroom and late checking in.

sample_comments.title: Bad memory
sample_comments.text: Book a room with a price of more than 6000 baht or > 178 usd per night, but get a room on basement floor room no 7111, the room is very humid. Mold in the ceiling and bathroom we are doctors. This type of room is not suitable for living especially people with allergies. there should be a system to monitor the condition of the room. In the bathroom there is a mirror but there is no plug for plugging in a hair dryer. Outside on deck, there is no mirror but there is a plug how can I set my hair?!? During we wait for golf car to the cable. There was no notice of the queue before or after either the way that there weren't many people, but let other people overtake the queue. Upon informing us that we came first, we huddled on the golf car with the group whom overtake the queue. The car is enough for five people, excluding the driver and luggage, but must Carry seven people and double the amount of luggage. On the way my bag falled in the middle of the road, almost being stepped on by a car on the way up the cable car. Some groups receive services from staff. But some people have to carry their own bags. In fact, carrying their own bags is not a problem. There is no sign to guide us where is the hotel to check in above We came to Vietnam this time for the second time, the first time was South Vietnam, the second time came to Central Vietnam. And we plan to come back again in the north Vietnam but experience we met here .Our family decided that we would never come back to Vietnam again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Samran,
We very much appreciate your comments regarding your stay at the Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills.

Thank you for sharing your experience, and we hope you have the opportunity to visit us again.

Best Regards,
Hung Nguyen,
Guest Experience Manager.

sample_comments.title: unsatisfactory
sample_comments.text: Nice hotel but poor management; it was too crowded and the breakfast food was good but there were guests who used their fingers to grab and touch food, while cutting in line. Staff should have better management to prevent cross contamination. We didn't eat much dinner buffet and breakfast because of concerns about cleanness. Our family room with bunk beds was not clean; blood on bathroom floor, feces on the glass bathroom wall, and their bath towels had hair stuck on it as if they haven't been washed. Other guests on the same floor as us were yelling and smoking across hallway all night and through the early morning. We called management to take care of the situation only for it to be resolved for 5 minutes until the rowdiness resumed.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.positives: great location right on the Bana Hills.
sample_comments.negatives: the room is warned out. not clean.

sample_comments.text: Room smelled of mold and musty. Upon arrival at property, there were no staff at reception at the foothill. Upon reaching the resort at the hilltop, have to lug my 2 heavy luggage up and down stairs. No bellboy to help. Tried the Thai restaurant for lunch. The chicken in the fried rice smelled. It had started to turn bad. Hotel staff are not familiar with location and regularly gives bad directions. Very poorly managed. The only upside is that its probably a great location for those who lived selfies and Instagram.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Nothing really. Not worth the stay. You can visit the golden bridge before the official opening but there are actually more people in the early morning than later in the day and the best shots are in the afternoon.
sample_comments.negatives: No airport pick up. Dysfunctional AC in my room, hot night. Not acceptable for the price you pay. Hassle going up by cable car to reach the hotel. What is the advantage? I didnt see any.

sample_comments.title: Fantastic
sample_comments.text: Well worth a visit. View from cable cars very good. Fantastic setup. Great for photos.
sample_comments.response:
Dear our Valued Guest,
Thank you so much for sharing the impressions of your recent stay at our Hotel
We are happy to learn that you enjoyed the culinary offerings. I am also glad that the service provided by our staff created a special impression of your stay.
