Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: A MUST STAY EXPERIENCE with LOTS TO DO!
sample_comments.positives: LOVED that we stayed up in the mountains with such incredible views and entertainment. The ride up in the cable car was amazing and the staff are all so friendly and welcoming. We loved having access to the Golden Bridge early in the morning before the crowds and in the evening after the crowds left. The alpine coasters are awesome and affordable for a family of four! Many of the rides were included with our stay so that was pretty cool. The breakdown buffet was delicious and had a big variety. Credit cards were accepted at most of the restaurants, some souvenir shops, alpine coaster, and cable car tickets.
sample_comments.negatives: The rooms are warm with no AC. The family suite with the bunk beds is small with zero privacy for showering and using the toilet.

sample_comments.title: Most dirty Mercure ever
sample_comments.text: We visit here for second time, first time we booked 4 rooms with family and friends,fist they put us next to under construction room which very loud and dusty. So we did make sure and asked the receptionist twice to make sure we will not earn that bad experience again.and she said yes. After we enter the room its again the under construction room just next door,hallways lift and overall is super dusty and dirty. The cheap guesthouse would be much cleaner. We did request the new room right away. And the bellboy just made a pissed face right away when we don't except the room. Even the next room we got is even more dusty and smelly. The use fake grass for interior hotel which collects all dust and dirt. Most disappointed mercure ever. Bad hygienic bad service bad breakfast buffet. Never again
sample_comments.response:
Dear Kantida,

Warmest greetings to Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills! 
Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay. I greatly appreciate your comments about aspects of the room that need updating. It is a pleasure to announce that we will be implementing many of these upgrades to the property within the next couple of months. In taking great care of our charming hotel, our main priority is to be able to offer a very well-maintained and comfortable atmosphere. I hope that I can convince you to change your mind about another visit to our property. 

With much appreciation,
Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Amazing village to visit in an incredible looking hotel, but did not meet our expectations.
sample_comments.positives: We were met by a bellboy as soon as we arrived with the cable car and he pushed them along to the hotel, which was a little up the road. The hotel is in an awesome location, looks like an amazing French chateau, right in the centre of everything. Check in was fine, by friendly staff.
sample_comments.negatives:
The lighting in the room was very weak; it was hard to read without the main light on.
The restaurant was extremely chaotic and seemed too small to take such a large volume of people; foods ran out quickly, we found the breakfast experience stressful, being pushed along by so many people and the breakfast choices were not that good.
There is no sleeping in, as the loud music starts early in the morning, and on one night there was loud thumping music until very late, which was easily heard in our room, which was at the backside of the building, looking at another close-by building. The walls are very thin and you can hear your neighbours move around and talk.
Definitely not value for the money we paid for this room!

sample_comments.title: Monopolized Market
sample_comments.text:
We traveled over to Mercure Danang French Village at Bana Hills after having spent 2 days in Danang Beach.

We took a cab up to Bana Hills which cost us about 600,000₫. We were thankful that the hotel had arranged for us to be dropped of at the first cable station instead of having to drive up the long winding road.

When we arrived at the 1st cable station, we were greeted by the front desk staff who helped bring our luggages up to the secondary lobby where we processed our check-in. After all formalities were done, we were then ushered over to the cable car where our luggages were stowed away and where we boarded to make way up to the actual hotel. 

The ride up to the hotel lasted about 20 minutes with breathtaking views of stunning natural waterfalls and lush green trees. The change of altitude and ambient temperature was also very obvious given that we were climbing to 1489 metres above sea level.

When we arrived at the top of the hills, we were again ushered by the hotel staff to the primary hotel lobby where we were issued our hotel key cards. We were then bought over to our room which was on the other annex, separate from where the primary lobby is.

When we got into our room, I was really disappointed with the size of the room and the fact that the pictures of the rooms were very very different from the actual room. I booked a Standard King Bed, but I am sure that the bed that I had was just merely a queen bed. That being said, I was advised by my partner not to kick up a fuss given that we were there for only a day.

After settling into our rooms, and unpacking what we had to unpack, we proceeded to explore the entire resort. Given the sheer size of the entire resort, we were surprise that there were no detailed maps listing the various attractions or places where we can have dinner at.

Speaking about finding places to eat at the resort; we realised that most of the restaurants closes at 6pm given that the staff have to travel down the hill in order to
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much your review.
It seems that we haven't achieved high stadndards during your stay and we would like to apologize.
Your comments are constructive and we will work with the team for improvement and an action plan.
Kind regards
The management

sample_comments.title: Very good

sample_comments.title: Clueless staff, they also don't know about the scam taxi drivers at their gates
sample_comments.text:
Completely clueless staff. Reception gives you a card but tell you that you are in a different building, proceeds to not tell you where or write down where. When we asked other staff they had no clue what building. Had to flag someone down who finally knew.

Also, asked about bus service back to danang, they said I had to ask our seperate building reception on checkout. On the day of checkout, they said there is no such thing, but then told me plenty of Grab drivers are waiting at front gates. Which, no, they are not, and all of them are SCAM TAXI drivers, not actual Grab waiting for you. So they don't even warn you about these scammers. Ignorant hotel staff.

Also, they screwed up our room and gave us twin instead of king. Staff are completely clueless.

sample_comments.title: Not a great hotel, but staying in the park after day visitors leave is magical
sample_comments.positives:
There is only this hotel to stay at, so we felt they don't put a lot of effort. 
The hotel is not good value for money, the staff and even managers aren't helpful and the rooms are not nice. The staff provided us with wrong information, about park opening times and attractions.
Food was okay but again restaurant much too full and staff overwhelmed, and it wasn't even high season yet. 

Also park ticket and cable car is not included in the hotel rate so be aware, you have to pay upon arrival to reach the hotel - the exact cost we didnt find anywhere mentioned, not their website or any booking site - we payed 40 euro p.p, but believe it is higher for high season. 

BUT the most incredible part is being in the Park alone, in the night the fog/clouds cover eveything and it feels absolutely magical, the rides are open for hotel visitors after the official closing time and this was a highlight of our trip
sample_comments.negatives: There is a big construction site so you will have that noise right outside your window and while visiting the park.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Room was extremely small and overlooked construction site, air con did not work properly. Breakfast is shared with 1,000 people, in one location. Only one decent coffee shop. Too many souvenir shops, no side-walk cafe's, not particularly like French at all. Once seen, would not go back. Long Cable Car ride was enjoyable. Hit & miss with weather, we were lucky. Overated, in my opinion. Go to France.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Syd,
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We're truly sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused by the size of the room, the construction site view, and the issues with the air conditioning. Providing comfortable accommodations and ensuring our guests' satisfaction are paramount to us, and we regret that we fell short in these areas.

Regarding breakfast arrangements, we understand your concerns and will review our procedures to ensure a more comfortable dining experience for our guests. Additionally, we appreciate your feedback regarding the availability of amenities and the ambiance of the surroundings. Your comments will be taken into consideration as we strive to enhance our offerings and atmosphere.

We appreciate your feedback and hope that you will reconsider visiting us again in the future. 

Best regards,

sample_comments.positives: The mercure have many different hotels (buildings) within the sun complex. I was in marseille and it was okay. Very small rooms. Great view of the village from the window. Breakfast was a bit average.
sample_comments.negatives: The staff were not very friendly. But they were busy as it was high season.

sample_comments.title: Aircon problems
sample_comments.text: I stayed for one night, but unfortunately, the air conditioning units in two of the three rooms we booked were not working. An engineer came to fix the issue and tested the units with a heat sensor device. They suggested resetting the outdoor unit and advised us to wait for 15 minutes. However, despite waiting until past midnight, the situation did not improve, and the air conditioning units remained faulty. As a result, we had to open the balcony door to let in some cool air from outside. That is the worst experience we ever had. Another friend also stayed there and experienced the same issue despite being upgraded to a better room - the air conditioning was still not working properly.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!
Dear Tin,
We're sorry to hear about your experience with the air conditioning at our hotel. Ensuring a comfortable stay for our guests is our top priority, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused by the malfunctioning units. We'll address this issue immediately to ensure all our facilities are in optimal condition. Additionally, we'll look into providing fans for rooms that currently lack them to mitigate any discomfort during warmer weather. 
Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and we appreciate your feedback as it helps us improve our services. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for a much more enjoyable stay in the future.
Best regards,
Guest Experience Department.

sample_comments.positives: It was within the premises of the park we intended to visit. The beds and pillow and blankets are comfortable. The towels and toiletries are sufficient. I like that robes and bottled waters were complimentary. I like there is daily housekeeping. I like that trash bins are good sizes not too small. The breakfast was full of variety.
sample_comments.negatives: The murky sewer-like smell of the hallways and entry ways leading to the elevators and the stairways. The shower drain not draining immediately so water is pooling up instead before it drains. The toilet lid latch being dirty. The room feeling warm at night waking us up even though we don't have the heater turned on. The blow dryer cord keeps on falling out of the outlet socket coz it's loose instead of fitting just right.

sample_comments.title: 2 night stay
sample_comments.text:
The room was very small, and moldy. The hotel was heavily under staffed. Prior to checking in we had called the hotel over a dozen times via their mainline but never once it was answered. 

For first time travellers, do arrive before 4pm local time as the cable operated until 5pm only, we nearly missed this due to late arrival and no one gave us proper assistance

sample_comments.title: A three night stay in Mercure at Bana Hills allowed us to leisurely see everything.
sample_comments.positives: Lots to enjoy in this beautiful location...beautiful views, gardens and some performances also. The staff were very nice and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives: The "foreign feel" was very unlike Southeast Asia. Also, it's extremely crowded from around 8 AM until about 6 PM.. Also, the hallways were significantly noisy very early in the morning and late at night. Additionally, the room temperature could not be adjusted and was a bit warm for sleeping.

sample_comments.title: No air-conditioner / Unattended Receptionist
sample_comments.text: Never book this room as the air-conditioning system was totally not functioning. Complain to the night-shift receptionist about this issue, but the solution he gave was to open the window during the whole night and sleep with the outside temperature of less than 20 degree celcius. Never expect to get such solution from a well-known hotel. Asked from receptionist for the help of the bell man to transfer the luggage during check in and check out, and the receptionist let me wait for more than 30 minutes without proceed with any bell man arrangement. Thanks Mercure Danang with this unforgettable experience.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear LIAU,

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your stay and glad that you enjoyed.

We appreciate your comments so we can improve and serve you better next time. Our hotel will grow more and more in the future, in order to serve well. We hope that you will come back to the hotel in the future and hope that you can introduce our hotel to your friends. 

Best regards.
Hannah (Ms.)
Guest Experience Supervisor.

sample_comments.title: Nice hotel, nice hotel staff, cable staff very rude both of staff at lobby and the lady at Alpine coster who give the wr
sample_comments.positives: Good location
sample_comments.negatives: Cable staffs as the receptionist was issued 10 tickets for us, we paid for 11 pax actualy staff should assist to inform the receptionist but her face very rude and didn't help anything

sample_comments.title: Expensive, not valued for money
sample_comments.text: Expensive, not valued for money, in night time no activity
sample_comments.response:
Dear Tuyen,
We very much appreciate your comments regarding your stay at the Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. 

It is always a pleasure to receive feedback which I will share with my team. I am sure that this feedback will continue to encourage our team to seek improvement and identify ways we can make our guests stay enjoyable.

Thank you for sharing your experience, and we hope you have the opportunity to visit us again.

Guest Experience Manager.

sample_comments.title: Sun World Ba Na Hills is an amazing place to visit in Vietnam and you just need this hotel to do so.
sample_comments.positives:
1. The location is amazing since it is the only one hotel on the mountain.
2. The buffet both breakfast and dinner are good. Have a lot of choices.
3. Stay at the hotel gives you early and late access to all the places and special shows.
5. The whole village up there is amazing and worth the stay. So the hotel don't need to really care for their service because people have no other choice anyway
sample_comments.negatives:
1. There only 3 counters for checking in at the hotel reception. Expect at least 30 mins waiting time for check in.
2. I saw some guest have bell boy to help with their luggage, but some are not. So i don't know what the criteria here and it can seem to be unfair. For my personal experience, sometime if they saw you then they help you, otherwise you just help yourself.
3. Because of no.2 we don't have someone to navigate us to the right building when we arrive at the French Village, and we get lost a bit since there are sooooo many people up there. I have to leave my mom in the middle of the street to seeking for help from the staff.
4. The mattress is not comfortable. It is not a good quality one. No conditioner and no shower cap in the bathroom. The coffee they offer in the room is Nescafe from Thailand. Vietnam is known for their coffee, so i think it a shame to use cheap 3 in 1 instant coffee like this.
5. They should just include the price for cable car with the room, everyone who booked the hotel needs the cable car ticket anyway, so why don't just include it. So we don't have to wait so long when checking in.

sample_comments.title: Really bad services!
sample_comments.text:
The price is not equal to quality. The service and staff are really bad. The food is really really terrible. 
Good location!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We hope to welcome you back to our hotel very soon! 
Kind regards, 
Hotel Management team

sample_comments.title: Communication between the front desk and housekeeping appears to be lacking, leading to multiple disturbances during the
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is located within a short walking distance from the check-in point. I booked 2 rooms for 6 guests, and we got good rooms in the same building and on the same floor
sample_comments.negatives:
I booked 2 rooms for 2 nights, but one of the rooms wasn't available for check-in at the scheduled time because the staff said there was an issue with the smell. We had to wait in the lobby for almost an hour after the official check-in time.

On the second day, housekeeping staff entered our room three times in the morning without knocking or asking first, while my partner and I were resting. The first time, I informed them that we were staying for two nights, and they left. The second time, they came in again to clean the room, and I told them I was sleeping. The third time, they entered again and told us to check out, even though I had already said we were staying for two nights. It was very disturbing and unprofessional. The hotel should inform housekeeping about the guests' stay duration so they don't mistakenly enter occupied rooms or disturb guests who are still staying.

sample_comments.title: A beautiful place
sample_comments.text:
1.It is very beautiful 
2.There is too much places under construction
3.It is difficult to take my luggage from my room to checking counter. Because it is rocky road.
4.My room has a very small window. I can not see anything.
5.There are abnormal sound from next room
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We hope to welcome you back to our hotel very soon! 
Kind regards, 
Hotel Management team
sample_comments.room_type: Standard room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Overall good place, fabulous location !
sample_comments.positives:
Location is fabulous. However too much noise in room during night time . Felt a bit overhyped. Also very much crowded on weekends. Prefer to stay on weekdays.

However , personally i would have taken a day tour to the place and stayed at danang beach

sample_comments.title: Cleanliness needs to be seriously improved
sample_comments.text:
1. Buffet area dirty. Check the plates and glasses. 
2. Room Dirty especially window and sink..
3. Saw with my naked eyes croissont / breads already felt on the floor, staff simply picked up and place it under the buffet table.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued guest,
Thank you very much for yur feedback.
We will take more attention.
The management

sample_comments.title: Incredible and unforgettable
sample_comments.positives: Everything
sample_comments.negatives: I believe the staff is not that much sufficient to manage huge numbers of people

sample_comments.title: Incompetent rip off merchants, just do the day trip
sample_comments.text:
When booking the hotel we looked on line and rang up the hotel directly to try and get a better deal at no point was it disclosed that there was an extra cost of getting to the hotel, this extra cost was for the gondola, this almost doubled the cost of staying there. We had paid a fair amount of money in transport to get there so they pretty much had us by the balls when we got there.

I was extremely disappointed with managements dealing of the issue. i talked to the manager about the dishonesty who said that she had no authority to resolve the issue, well not entirly true she said she could buy me a lemonade but not a beer from the bar, which i found insulting. I put to her a reasonable resolution and asked her to talk to her GM and get back to me which she said she would. She did not give me the courtesy of getting back to me. I was disappointed that she had lied to me, as I now believe she had no intention of coming back to me or talking to the GM. I was shocked that a hotel chain of the Mecure's reputation treated clients as they did in this instance. Just be aware if you have a problem they will not be willing to hear your concerns and will most likely ignore any issues you may have.

More about the place, The resort itself is pretty cool and there is a lot to see and do. but this is only between about 9am and 5pm after this almost everything closes, with the exception of the hotels restaurant and one other restaurant. So you are very isolated in a place with pretty much nothing to do and nothing available. The place place is dead after 5. My girlfriend who is Vietnamese told me that Vietnamese people only really ever come up there for a day trip to enjoy the games and attractions that happen during the day. In hind site this is the smart way to go.

The restaurant in the hotel, just to give you an idea of how many people were present in this place we went to the hotel restaurant at night, approx 6.30pm but no one person was eating there, not a single pe
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you very much your review.
It seems that we haven't achieved high stadndards during your stay and we would like to apologize.
Your comments are constructive and we will work with the team for improvement and an action plan.
Kind regards
The management

sample_comments.title: For convenience only
sample_comments.positives: It's in bana hills
sample_comments.negatives: The lodgings were separated from the main hotel so inconvenient

sample_comments.title: Aircon not functioning and extra fee
sample_comments.text: i found it quite unreasonable that the hotel charges guests for the cable car ride required to reach the property. Upon arriving at the reception building at the base of the mountain, we were told we had to pay an additional fee to actually get to the hotel where we were staying. Since the hotel is located on the mountain and inaccessible otherwise, this transport should be included in the room rate, not treated as an extra expense for checked-in guests. To make matters worse, the air conditioning in our room was faulty. Despite maintenance staff visiting three separate times to attempt repairs, the room remained uncomfortably hot. Despite the clear failure to resolve the issue, the hotel management did not offer to move us to a different room. This lack of basic comfort and poor service recovery made our stay very unpleasant. not recommended
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, xin chào!
Dear Ruby,

Thank you for providing your detailed feedback. We sincerely apologize for the series of frustrations you and your group experienced during your stay. We aim to provide a seamless and comfortable experience, and it is clear that on this occasion, we missed the mark significantly.

Regarding the cable car fee, we understand your perspective. Because the cable car system is managed by the Sun World Ba Na Hills theme park rather than the hotel directly, it is currently a separate charge. However, we always strive to ensure our guests are aware that we offer a special discounted rate for hotel residents. We recognize how this can feel like an unexpected expense and we appreciate your feedback on how this affects the overall value of your stay.

Most importantly, we are deeply sorry for the discomfort caused by the air conditioning in your bunk room. While we are glad our maintenance team was responsive, the fact that they were unable to resolve the heat after

sample_comments.negatives: The check in process was slow, long line that barely moved, the staff weren't very friendly nor helpful. A major downfall is hours of things - we couldn't get food or drinks or find staff ever. We were up long before any coffee or food was open, it'd be nice if one thing was open or vending machines or a way to get drinks and snacks after hours. sample_comments.room_type: Standard room with Twin Beds

sample_comments.title: Great location and good over night experience at BaNA, but..lots to be improved.
sample_comments.positives:
- The location, it is in the middle of action, if you want to stay over night at Ba na hills, this is it. (although this is the only hotel there) 
- The breakfast was awesome. One of the best buffet breakfast I had. Wide variety. Usually buffet bread sucks but this one didn't.
- I liked the fact that after 5-6pm when all the day trip travelers leave, the whole park is only for the people who stay over night and it was a very cool experience.
- The swimming pool was fun. 
- Nice and kind staff
sample_comments.negatives:
- They were not so responsive on booking.com messenger. I was not informed about Mercure hotel's private ticket booth / check-in counter at the bottom of the Ba Na hills and I ended up paying more with a regular cable car tickets. 
- It was kind of hard to find the hotel after we got off the cable car. Some instructions should have been included in their first message after booking
- I requested a quiet room but the room was I think next to a restaurant and I heard banging sound almost non-stop and I felt like they really didn't pay attention to my request at all.
- The room was very small for the price I paid. 
- The bathroom ceiling started to leak so we had to move our room. The hotel upgraded our room which was nice but they put us into a double bed room (we are two friends and our original room was twin room). So we had to wait until they find another twin room and it took about an hour in total until we settled. Again, I didn't feel they were careful enough.
- I left a phone charger and some cosmetics which was my fault but we waited 10 minutes until they check the room after check out but they didn't tell me anything about it. 
- 10:30 check out is too early.

sample_comments.title: Bana trip
sample_comments.text: Check in took for near 2 hours. When the counter closed, reach us only asked us queue others. Then there are people cut queue in between and pretend is their queue. After check in received hotel voucher, took cable car went up hill need check in again for room key, another queue!
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào!

Dear YX,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during check-in and the additional queues. We understand that long waiting times and confusion can be frustrating, and this is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide.

We truly appreciate your patience, and please know that we are reviewing our check-in process to make it more efficient in the future. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us improve, and we hope to have the opportunity to offer you a smoother experience next time.

Warm regards,
Kayden (Mr.)
Assistant Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Good breakfast, nice stuff, room not as expected, a lot of they need to fix.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was really great, a lot of choices, all food is fresh.
sample_comments.negatives:
So called "quick check in" online couple days before did not work. At the lower station they checked in us in the morning at 10 and when We came to the upper reception after 2 p.m. our room was not still ready, they had around 4 hours, so instead of taking keys and go we had to wait a little. I hope it was only my case. And the personal was very kind to us, they tried to do their best.
A little about the room: too tricky system of lights switches, sometimes totally unpredictable, on some reason light switches connected with electrical sockets and You have to guess how to charge your phone and turn off light simultaneously))). Some lamps are eco types and don't go off fully even if turned off.
The dark brown colored walls ... as for me are depressive.
The ventilation system: when somebody smokes in another room you will get the smell from the ventilation.
The view out of the window: not all rooms have the view to Da Nang as declared. And I think the Hotel has to publish it appropriately, especially for this prepaid option.

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We are truly sorry to hear that the weather affected your experience at Mercure Danang French Village Ba Na Hills. Unfortunately, we understand that weather conditions are beyond our control, and it can sometimes impact the enjoyment of certain activities.

We hope you will consider visiting again when the weather is more favorable so that you can fully enjoy everything the resort and surrounding area have to offer. Should you decide to return, please let us know, and we will do our best to make your next stay more memorable.

Thank you for your understanding, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you again.

Best regards,
Kayden (Mr.)
Assistant Guest Experience Manager

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Near
sample_comments.negatives: Lighting in room have any problem. It can not be turn off. I can't sleep all night

sample_comments.title: Poor service
sample_comments.text:
Although I liked the location, the service was extremely poor. Traveling with small children, I had booked a premium-priced cab service through the hotel. However, when I arrived at the airport, there was no one to pick me up. After calling the hotel, they eventually sent a cab, but this delayed my pickup by more than an hour.

Additionally, the booking was under one hotel name, but upon reaching the top of the mountain, I discovered there were several hotels, and I had to locate my assigned one. No one at the counter informed us about this. When we arrived at the top via cable car, there was no one to greet us or assist with finding our hotel. After a 30-minute struggle, I finally reached the hotel, only to find no reception representative available. I had to search elsewhere to find the front desk to collect my room key. By the time I got the key, it was 5 PM, which coincided with Sunworld's closing time. As a result, we missed an entire day of fun due to the hotel's poor service. Moreover there was no feedback form or service from hotel. Which shows it is not their priority as the location is good people will come as they are the only hotel on there.
sample_comments.response:

sample_comments.text:
1. The service is good, birthday cake provide for my bf as he is birthday and Staff are friendly and efficient.

3. I don't feel comfortable when I saw a big lady portrait on the wall of the bed head, It's like she keep staring at me. Especially during night time.
4. Aircon was spoilt in the midnight, we totally can't sleep well. There is two aircon in our room even one aircon is functioning but still hot. 
5. There's no air in the room, we need to open the windows to breathe even it's raining.

i'm glad that our staff delivery for you the warmest greeting and taking care while you was there. 
With regards to the rooms, as the hotel is build in the style of a French Village the hotel and the rooms are very unique, many of our rooms are separated by an open concrete wall which allows the sense of space which is reflected in our images. Way up was great service and all but the way down is a nightmare, we have many luggages, and as hotel guests we queue with the tour groups in order to get down, worse yet, the bell boys were just standing around and didn't offer to help. It is very inconvenient and not a very nice experience. 
Other than being able to enjoy when thebtour group has left or before they arrived, nothing is really special. Food choices is limited, starbucks, lotteria and many stalls were closed when it's only the hotel guests left. Think it is much better to squeeze with everyone than have that little moments of 'lesser' crowd with very much nothing else.

sample_comments.title: Dirty Hotel inside Bana Hills
sample_comments.text: The good thing about this hotel is that is located inside Bana Hills. I made a mistake booking two nights. One night would have been enough. The check in and checkout was a nightmare with hundreds of people waiting and you had no idea where the queue starts. My room was located on the top floor of the Bourdeaux hotel and it was horrifying. There was a small window near the top of the ceiling that makes it looked like an ancient Spanish prison. The room was so ugly and depressing that we couldn't sleep well. During our stay we were both sick, I am suspecting that was because of the poor cleaning of the room and the park. As soon as we arrived to Da Nang, we felt better. It is a complete disappointment because what I thought it would be the best stay, ended up to be the worst. I would never stay in this place again.

another thing to note- no staff tried to help us out with our luggage and it just defeated the purpose of our stay to rest- so. This was my second visit to this and during this time I decided to stay in the hotel- but i did not expect it would be like this. sample_comments.text: Ok, first of all I booked 2 king sized bed room which theoritically can fit in 4 people and I did wrote there in note to add another 1 bed for me. They ignore the request and never mention anything before the trip. So when I reach the counter, the receptionist said I only book for 2 persons and request me to pay for another 3 persons fee with room upgrade because that king sized bedroom cannot add in another bed. The receptionist named Ms Jo miscalculated the fees needed for upgrading the rooms and I was forced to go back to counter when I was already in the cable car station (what a shame). At last they did provide extended check out time (until 12pm) which at first should be only till 1030am. The weather is hazy and rainy, not really enjoy the scene. The free voucher of beer or food is useless as they only serve beer on that time. The overall decoration of the rooms are quite old with some ancient medieval picture hanging on the wall (looks a bit scary to me). Overall, bad experience. Never choose for night stay during December. I'd suggest either you come in good weather season or do a day trip after seeing weather forecast.

sample_comments.title: Unfriendly staff behaviour, really bad facility
sample_comments.text:
From any decent hotel, let alone a supposedly 4 star hotel one expects a decent bathroom& toilet. 

The bathroom and toilet were made of glass sheets, not even reaching to the ceiling. The size of the toilet -at maximum 3 feet by 4 feet and size of bathroom - maybe 4 feet by 4 feet. There was no hook, no shelf to keep your toiletries in the bathroom because hey, it was so small. Every sound you made, every smell wafted inside the room to exhilarate your room mate and remind them that you are in a cozy space. 

You couldn't even keep the toilet door open because her you were visible to the person in the bed. 

I've had much bigger bathrooms in 1 star hotel. 

The room had thick mattress, an iron, an ironing board, an extra large sink occupying perhaps 1/8th of total room area! 

The room overlooked back of a building! I didn't pay big bucks for this kind of room. 

Now for the staff - pretty unwilling reception staff at hotel de Paris. The reception staff at base station was smiling and friendly though. The bell boy, who has our luggage ticket, was too busy pandering to another set of guests and then spent 5 minutes chatting with another staff while we waited to receive the luggage and check into our room. 

Now about breakfast - Very limited variety of fruits. Our hotel in sapa and Danang served at least 2 - 3 times variety of fruits. Only two coffee machines had been setup to dispense hot coffee/milk to more than 200 guests and these machines broke down/were not operational for at least 30 minutes of the 50 minutes I was in the breakfast room. There was only one (!) toasting machine and a huge queue would form there. For vegetarians there was limited spread but that would have been okay if enough varieties of fruits had been available. 

My experience of Bana hills was ruined because of the stay at Mercure hotel.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Location, But Terrible Service Experience
sample_comments.text:
We traveled as two families with three young children, excited to experience Ba Na Hills. Unfortunately, our stay at Mercure was frustrating from start to finish due to disorganized service and poor staff attitude.

Arrival & Check-In Chaos: We were told to carry our own luggage through multiple points, dragging trolleys all the way uphill. At the allocated unit, doors were locked, and no staff were available. After wandering helplessly, we eventually got assistance, but only after a bell boy argued with the receptionist in front of us. Even then, we were told to come back at 2 pm for the key. When we returned, another receptionist at the unit near ours mistakenly thought we were checking out, and sent us around again with a different bell boy. After this back-and-forth, we finally received our room key---well past 3 pm.

Room Allocation Disappointment: Although we booked a Deluxe Family Room with mountain view, we were given a room facing the forest with no view at all. Our request for a proper view was ignored, leaving us extremely disappointed given the premium price (260 SGD per night).

Checkout Drama: On departure, we requested help with luggage, but no one showed up despite repeated calls over 45 minutes. With young children, rain, and hungry kids, this was unacceptable. We asked whether wait opposite restaurant having lunch, they asked to wait. Only after raising our voices did we finally get assistance.

Overall Impression: The property itself is beautiful, with stunning surroundings, but the service was one of the worst we have experienced. The lack of professionalism, poor coordination, and indifference to guests' needs completely ruined our holiday experience.

Despite sending feedback to the hotel in both English and Vietnamese and submitting it via their website, no one from management has responded to date.

Verdict: A scenic location let down by shockingly poor service.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!

Dear Sojin,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. We are deeply sorry to hear about the challenges you faced during your stay, and we sincerely apologize for the service shortcomings you encountered.

First and foremost, we are glad that you appreciated the beautiful location and surroundings of our property. However, we are truly disappointed to hear that your experience with our service did not meet expectations, particularly during your arrival, room allocation, and departure.

We deeply regret the disorganization during check-in, as well as the miscommunication and delays with luggage assistance. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide, and we understand the frustration it caused, especially when traveling with young children. Additionally, we apologize for the inconvenience caused by the room allocation, and we regret that we were unable to meet your req

sample_comments.title: TERRIBLE IN MOST SENSES, CHEAP STAFF AND LOW ON AMENITIES
sample_comments.text:
Entered Hotel, asked for promised complimentary drinks, "WATER IS COMPLIMENTARY - 2 small bottles for each booking" said the lady at the counter.
Broken toilet door Locks, 
And Smelly Rooms, 
Absolutely no one at the Building Reception, 
No Service Staff, Extremely Impolite, Unpolished behaviour of Main Receptionists,
Swimming Pool full of Chemical, 
No way to get drinking water, until you pay for Overpriced small water bottles, 
Heavily Crowded Breakfast Area, almost like a fish market, 
Only good things is , it's located in the Sun World, 
People are forced to book it by force because they don't have any other option if they want to stay there, 
They Lost my luggage twice, and told my to find it myself in their store room and in the reception area, 
They will turn back from their promised amenities just so that they can overcharge you for anything possible.
If in future you have an option to not book this hotel, take that option.
One of the most Service-less and Horrible Hotel I have stayed in, 
And whatever room you book online, they will give in accordance to their availablity.
I REPEAT I HAVE TRAVELLED THE WORLD AND NO-BODY HAS EVER TOLD ME THAT COMPLIMENTARY DRINKS ARE 2 300ML WATER BOTTLES.
WHAT A JOKE OF HOSPITALITY

sample_comments.title: Room condition and staff
sample_comments.text:
Stayed at the resort family superior room with 2 bulk beds and a queen size bed. First thing we entered the room was the smell of cigarette smoke and damp mould. The walls look like they had moulds on them especially near the queen bed and wall mounted TV. The service staff brought a scented candle to help with the smell but that was only temporary. 
There was also no shower cap and the ones they gave us just disintegrated like tissue paper when wet. There was not enough floor towels. 
The weather was wet and cold. Everywhere was slippery. When checking out, staff gave us the wrong information on which cable car to take to go back down the mountain. Had a mad rush in the rain with luggage and children to the Golden Bridge side to take the cable car down. It was anxious for us as we had a train to catch in Danang.

sample_comments.title: A beautiful hotel, vibrant and full of life.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is beautiful and looks exactly like the photos. It's located right in the heart of the French Village, within walking distance of all the main activities and accessible by cable car. The staff are helpful and attentive to guests' needs. The hotel's location is not accessible by regular car; guests must take the cable car, the ride takes around 20 minutes. Guests are first welcomed at the hotel's lobby, which is reachable by car. From there, they are transferred via cable car to the French Village, where the hotel is situated. It was a completely new and wonderful experience. The cost of accessing the hotel via cable car was not included in the room rate.
sample_comments.negatives: When we arrived at the hotel lobby, there was a thunderstorm and heavy rain. We had to wait for nearly an hour and a half until the storm calmed down, as the cable car does not operate during severe weather conditions. Had the storm lasted longer, we would have had to wait even longer. I would suggest that the hotel develop a contingency plan for such situations, as storms could potentially last through the night, and waiting that long in the lobby is not a practical option. That said, when we contacted the duty manager, he was kind, cooperative, and very understanding of our concerns. He assured us that he would find a solution. Eventually, the cable car service resumed, and we were safely transported to the hotel. Another point that needs improvement is the high level of crowding at the hotel. Additionally, the rooms lack proper sound insulation, which makes it easy to hear noise from neighboring rooms and the street outside. All in all, it was a wonderful experience --- truly worth it. The breakfast could benefit from including more options that cater to guests from outside Asia.

sample_comments.title: A peaceful stay with unmatched access to key attractions, though limited evening activities may not suit everyone.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel was well-maintained, offering a clean environment, a pleasant view, and a buffet breakfast with a wide variety of international cuisine options
sample_comments.negatives:
This isn't a reflection on the property itself, but rather the location---by 8:00 PM, everything in the area closes, leaving no options for dining or evening activities, which can make for a quiet and uneventful night.

However, staying at this hotel offers the advantage of skipping long queues. As a guest, you can take the cable car directly to the hotel and access the Golden Bridge early, before day visitors arrive. This allows you to explore the bridge and nearby attractions without the usual crowds or delays.

sample_comments.negatives: Sadly it was the dining options that let us down. We didn't want to buffet dine, but everywhere we went they were out of what we wanted. No steak at one dining option, no fish at another. Ended up with bbq option outside in the cold.

sample_comments.title: I regret booking in this hotel
sample_comments.text:
I have emailed the property 5 days before my arrival to change the name of the primary guest. No answer. I called the property directly and tried 3 different prompt extension numbers and it just kept ringing and then get disconnected. So I contacted Agoda customer service and they try to contact them and told me to wait 24-48 hours for them to get back. Well, the time has come that I have to check-in and nothing. So I went ahead and changed my plans and went to the property. I got in and the room is so old. The bed is sunk in the middle. The furnitures look beat up. The A/C turned off in the middle of the night so I had to open a window. I'm in the first floor and this made me uncomfortable. The air filter might have been dirty and wasn't replaced because my face got all itchy. So no sleep for me. I called the front desk and no answer. 

I went down the next day and talked to the manager. He moved me to a different room. It's better but the mattress needs to be updated. I was still sinking in the middle and I'm not that heavy. 

Overall, it is not worth the nightly stay here. I recommend getting a day tour and start early.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: The cable car going to the top was great. Longest cable car in the world with a beautiful view. The hotel was obviously not as new compared to city hotels but it was good, very comfortable.I suggest you plan your trip when it is not rainy cause the place would be too foggy and won't be as great for pictures takings.

sample_comments.title: Highly overrated and very commercialised
sample_comments.text: Many shops closed around 5pm and only a few restaurants offered only buffet and if you look for non buffet restaurants, the option for you is less than 5 restaurants. My stay over there is definitely my worst experience during my trip to Danang. The bana hill is just overrated and super duper crowded. We didn't manage to visit the golden bridge as the weather is not suitable during the visit.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear An,
Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hill would like to express our heartfelt gratitude for your recent visit to the specific and only French village in Vietnam. On behalf of the Mercure Danang French Village Ba Na Hills staff, I would like to express my deep regret for the negative experience you encountered during your stay. 
We genuinely regret the inconveniences you faced during your stay. We understand the frustration with limited dining options and the overwhelming crowds at Bana Hill. Weather conditions can indeed be unpredictable and impact sightseeing plans. Your feedback serves as a valuable opportunity for us to enhance our services and address these concerns. Rest assured, we're committed to providing a more enjoyable experience for our guests. We hope you'll consider giving us another chance to exceed your expectations and create lasting memories on your next visit to Danang.
Best regards,
Guest Experience Department
sample_comments.room_type: Family Deluxe with 1 King bed and 1 Bunk Bed

sample_comments.title: nice place to be leisure
sample_comments.positives: we are very impressive for the staff, they are all service minded.
sample_comments.negatives: the food

sample_comments.title: Không xứng với giá tiền
sample_comments.text:
Phòng ốc cũ kĩ. Tắc cống, điều hoà không mát.
Khách quá đông còn nhân viên thì thiếu thốn, không chuyên nghiệp. After service quá tệ. 
Đồ ăn dở.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Mai thân mến,

Chúng tôi xin thành thật xin lỗi về những trải nghiệm không tốt mà bạn đã gặp phải trong thời gian lưu trú tại Mercure Danang French VIllage Bana Hills. Phản hồi của bạn là một cơ hội quý báu để chúng tôi cải thiện dịch vụ của mình và chúng tôi đánh giá cao điều đó.

Chúng tôi đã ghi nhận mọi ý kiến của bạn và chúng tôi sẽ tiến hành các biện pháp cần thiết để khắc phục các vấn đề đã được nêu ra. Chúng tôi sẽ kiểm tra và cải thiện hệ thống cống rãnh để đảm bảo sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách hàng; đồng thời sẽ thực hiện các biện pháp để nâng cao chất lượng của nhân viên nhằm đảm bảo tất cả dịch vụ đều được cung cấp chu đáo nhất.

Về món ăn, chúng tôi đã ghi nhận phản hồi của bạn và chúng tôi sẽ làm việc chặt chẽ với đầu bếp để cải thiện chất lượng của nhà hàng.

Chúng tôi hiểu rằng không thể làm mất đi những trải nghiệm không tốt vừa qua, nhưng chúng tôi hy vọng bạn sẽ cho chúng tôi cơ hội để cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ trong tương lai.

Trân trọng!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: I'm indifferent.

sample_comments.title: Low standard
sample_comments.text:
We've got a lower standard room, without the view we booked. 
Airconditioning not working.

Thank you for taking the time to bringing this issues to our attention. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you've encountered with your room.

Our team is working to resolve the issues with the lower standard room, the missing view, and the AC. Please know that your feedback is invaluable to us, and we are committed to addressing these issues to enhance the overall guest experience. We hope you'll consider giving us another chance to exceed your expectations in the future.

sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Great overnight experience
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is in a great location up in the ba na resort. The hotel room was clean and they provided two nice bottles of water, toiletries, etc. We paid for the upgrade to a delux twin which came with a view of the french village below. Staying at the hotel comes with the added bonus of being both the first and last people in the resort. It is much quieter once all of the day visitors leave.
sample_comments.negatives:
The room was an interesting studio style - there was a small privacy wall between the sink and the beds, but the toilet and shower were separated by frosted glass doors that did not go all the way to the floor or ceiling. It was like using a public restroom in your hotel room - no privacy from the other people in our group. 

It would have been nice to have a clear schedule of different events/shows happening each day, but the staff were friendly and helped us navigate what to do during our stay.

sample_comments.title: Bad odour & noisy
sample_comments.text: Bad odour from the reception to the room. Very poor noise insulation, we can hear the person next room snoring the whole night!
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin chào!
Dear Anh,

Thank you for trusting and choosing our hotel for your vacation.
On behalf of the Mercure Danang French Village Ba Na Hills management, I would like to express my deep regret for the negative noise experience you encountered during your stay.

At Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, we always strive to bring an enjoyable and high-quality experience for all customers. We apologize for any inconvenience caused by noise and odors. We understand the importance of a quiet and relaxing vacation for our customers. Therefore, we are actively working to improve soundproofing and odors throughout the hotel premises. We appreciate your feedback, and it will assist us in taking measures to enhance customer comfort.

We look forward to the opportunity to bring you a more relaxing experience in the future.
Best regards,
Hung Nguyen (Mr.)
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: It was memorable.
sample_comments.positives: The exclusivity
sample_comments.negatives: Getting to your property should be free since we are guests, don't charge the cable cars anymore especially if they are staying in Mercure overnight. Also, most of the staff don't know how to speak english, like your housekeeping and doctor.

sample_comments.title: Not a pleasant stay
sample_comments.text: The entire hotel including my room smelled like restroom. The air conditioner didn't work properly and the weather was quite hot. Our room was connected to another room and we could hear their TV at night and in the early morning. Also, we booked a room with city or mountain view but we got a room with construction site view.
sample_comments.response:
Bonjour, Xin Chào,
Dear Chalisa,
Warmest greetings from Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills! 

Thank you for sharing your feedback regarding your stay and glad that you enjoyed.

We appreciate your comments so we can improve and serve you better next time. Our hotel will grow more and more in the future, in order to serve well. We hope that you will come back to the hotel in the future and hope that you can introduce our hotel to your friends. 

Best regards.
Hung Nguyen (Mr.)
Guest Experience Manager.
sample_comments.room_type: Superior room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Location
sample_comments.negatives: Crowded

sample_comments.title: Foggy and wet all the time
sample_comments.text: The hills were foggy and wet all the time we saw nothing and only managed to take a few rides in the amusement park. Avoid at all cost to visit during rainy season. Path between cable car and hotel was treacherous- floor was super wet and hence slippery, the set up of whole place was not built to be luggage and stroller friendly, there's only escalator and no elevator, ramp was very steep, this was made much worst during wet days. The only saving grace was there was bell boy to help with the luggages. The hills are probably much better during dry seasons.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Sin,
We very much appreciate your comments regarding your stay at the Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. 

It is always a pleasure to receive feedback which I will share with my team. I am sure that this feedback will continue to encourage our team to seek improvement and identify ways we can make our guests stay enjoyable.

Thank you for sharing your experience, and we hope you have the opportunity to visit us again.

Best Regards,
Hung Nguyen,
Guest Experience Manager.

sample_comments.title: Amazing and unique experience
sample_comments.positives:
This hotel has activities for all ages, was very fun to stay and enjoy the village, the cable car, the roller coasters, games and amazing views.
The room is just for sleeping as is small and the bathroom is very close to the beds, not very private if you traveling with someone else.
sample_comments.negatives: Trying to get help or information thru the chat with front desk. They answer 2 days after.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The room had a damp smell and the design/decoration was sad and tired-looking. The toilet and shower cubicles looked like a public WC with a total lack of privacy. The control switch for 1 room light is linked to the toilet light, hence we had to sleep with the room light shining glaringly at us. A total disappointing 5-star hotel.
sample_comments.response: Dear Bee, Warmest greetings to Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills! Our hotel is very grateful for your comments, thank you for choosing our hotel when you were in Da Nang. We are sorry for the room was not meet your expectation. Thanks for taking the time to bring this to our attention. I am sure that this feedback will continue to encourage our team to seek improvement and identify ways we can make our guests stay enjoyable. We would appreciate another chance to earn your business. Please feel free to contact us next time you're at hotel. Best regards Guest Relation Team
sample_comments.room_type: Deluxe room with King Size Bed

sample_comments.title: Village is like from a fairy-tale
sample_comments.positives:
The whole resort was beautiful and well-maintained and certainly worth the experience. We highly recommend staying overnight as most of the tourists disappear (+- 17:00 hours) in order to catch the last cable car down the mountain.
The staff were very efficient and helpful.
The room (amazing view of French Quarter cathedral and street below) and bathroom were excellent; the bed was comfortable. The room included a safe and a kettle.
The swimming pool complex (free pool with hotel stay) was beautiful and well-maintained.
sample_comments.negatives:
Check-in was at a different building (we didn't know this) to the standard entry to the resort. The check-in process (at the foot of the cable car) was slow required standing in a line; once checked in, the access to the cable car was quick and easy.
The breakfast was designed for many people, but the choices were rather limited compared to what we had experienced in the Hanoi hotels.
The shower water flow was slow.
Leaving the resort (we left before noon), the escalators at the foot of the cable car were all going upwards to cope with the incoming tourist crowds, which meant that we had to walk down many flights of steps (fortunately we didn't have our luggage with us).

secondary.description_full:
Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills - Nơi lưu trú tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khách sạn 4.0 sao tọa lạc tại thành phố Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam. Với một loạt các tiện nghi và dịch vụ chất lượng, khách sạn này là lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố và khu vực xung quanh.

Khách sạn có tổng cộng 461 phòng nghỉ rộng rãi và thoải mái, mang đến cho du khách không gian nghỉ ngơi tuyệt vời. Năm xây dựng của khách sạn là 2016, và năm cập nhật gần nhất là 2022, đảm bảo rằng các phòng nghỉ được trang bị các tiện nghi hiện đại và tiện lợi nhất. 

Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn chỉ cách trung tâm thành phố 30km và sân bay chỉ mất khoảng 40 phút di chuyển. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng là 10:30 AM, giúp du khách có đủ thời gian tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại đây. Đặc biệt, khách sạn cũng cho phép trẻ em từ 2 đến 11 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ.

Tiện nghi giải trí tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khu nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam với nhiều tiện nghi giải trí đa dạng. Khách sạn này cung cấp một số cửa hàng để bạn mua sắm và tìm hiểu văn hóa địa phương. Bạn cũng có thể thư giãn và thưởng thức đồ uống tại quầy bar của khách sạn. Nếu bạn muốn làm mới bản thân, hãy ghé thăm salon và tận hưởng dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp. Ngoài ra, bạn còn có thể thả lỏng cơ thể và thư giãn tại bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và phòng sauna. Để tận hưởng trọn vẹn kỳ nghỉ của mình, hãy ghé thăm spa của khách sạn để được chăm sóc và làm đẹp. Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng những giây phút vui vẻ, hãy đến phòng trò chơi hoặc khu vực chung để xem TV. Khách sạn còn có phòng karaoke để bạn thể hiện tài năng ca hát của mình. Cuối cùng, hãy ghé qua cửa hàng quà lưu niệm để mang về những món đồ độc đáo làm kỷ niệm cho chuyến du lịch của bạn.

Các Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam với nhiều tiện nghi thể thao đa dạng. Khách sạn này cung cấp một hồ bơi trong nhà tiện lợi, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn và tập luyện. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một trung tâm thể dục miễn phí, nơi bạn có thể rèn luyện sức khỏe và thể lực của mình.

Nếu bạn yêu thích các hoạt động ngoài trời, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cũng có nhiều tiện ích thể thao khác như bàn bóng bàn, sân chơi bowling và bảng phi tiêu. Bạn có thể tham gia vào các trò chơi này cùng gia đình và bạn bè để tạo ra những kỷ niệm đáng nhớ. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có các đường dẫn leo núi tuyệt đẹp, cho phép bạn khám phá thiên nhiên và thử thách bản thân. Hãy tận hưởng những hoạt động thể thao và giải trí tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills!

Tiện nghi tiện lợi tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills tọa lạc tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách những tiện nghi tiện lợi hàng đầu. Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, quý khách có thể yên tâm gọi đồ ăn và đồ uống ngay tại phòng của mình. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ phòng hàng ngày để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho quý khách.

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cũng có các tiện ích khác như hộp đựng đồ an toàn, dịch vụ lễ tân, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong khu vực công cộng và tất cả các phòng. Nếu quý khách có nhu cầu làm việc hoặc giải trí, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ trả phòng nhanh chóng. Bên cạnh đó, quý khách cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ để giữ hành lý và đảm bảo an toàn cho các vật dụng cá nhân của mình. Với tất cả những tiện ích này, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cam kết mang đến cho quý khách một trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện lợi.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách. Khách sạn có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, giúp khách hàng dễ dàng di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn một cách thuận tiện. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đỗ xe valet và bãi đỗ xe, giúp khách hàng không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe. 

Đối với khách hàng muốn tự lái xe, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills cung cấp dịch vụ cho thuê xe, giúp khách hàng có thể tự do khám phá vùng đất Đà Nẵng. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí, giúp khách hàng di chuyển dễ dàng từ khách sạn đến các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng trong khu vực. Nếu khách hàng muốn di chuyển bằng taxi, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt xe taxi, đảm bảo sự thuận tiện và an toàn cho khách hàng. Khách sạn cũng có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí, giúp khách hàng không phải lo lắng về việc tìm chỗ đỗ xe.

Thưởng thức ẩm thực tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, bạn sẽ được trải nghiệm những dịch vụ ẩm thực đa dạng và tuyệt vời. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24/7, cho phép bạn thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại chính phòng nghỉ của mình. Bạn cũng có thể ghé qua quán cà phê để thưởng thức một ly cà phê thơm ngon hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn nhẹ tại đây.

Ngoài ra, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills còn có nhà hàng phục vụ các món ăn đa dạng và ngon miệng. Bạn có thể tận hưởng bữa sáng tự chọn tại nhà hàng hoặc thưởng thức bữa sáng kiểu châu Âu truyền thống. Dịch vụ phục vụ phòng hàng ngày cũng được cung cấp để đảm bảo sự thoải mái và sạch sẽ cho khách hàng. Với các tiện ích ẩm thực tuyệt vời như vậy, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đáng để bạn khám phá và tận hưởng.

Trải Nghiệm Phòng Nghỉ Đa Dạng Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng nghỉ phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Từ các phòng tiêu chuẩn như Standard Room With King Size Bed và Standard Room With Twin Beds, đến các phòng cao cấp như Superior Room With King Size Bed hay Superior Room With Twin Beds, mỗi loại phòng đều mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa trong không gian 22-25 mét vuông. Đối với những gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn, các lựa chọn như Family Superior With 1 King Bed And 1 Bunk Bed hoặc Family Bunks With 4 Bunk Beds sẽ giúp mọi người có những trải nghiệm vui vẻ và tiện nghi. Ngoài ra, các phòng suite như Duplex Suite hay Executive Suite mang đến không gian rộng rãi lên tới 41-46 mét vuông, lý tưởng cho những kỳ nghỉ đặc biệt hoặc các chuyến công tác quan trọng.

Hòa Ninh - Nơi tĩnh lặng giữa lòng Đà Nẵng

Hòa Ninh là một khu vực yên bình và tĩnh lặng nằm giữa lòng thành phố Đà Nẵng sôi động. Với vẻ đẹp tự nhiên hùng vĩ và không gian thanh bình, Hòa Ninh là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trốn khỏi sự ồn ào và hối hả của cuộc sống đô thị.

Khu vực Hòa Ninh nằm cách trung tâm thành phố Đà Nẵng chỉ khoảng 20 phút lái xe, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho du khách muốn khám phá cả hai mặt của thành phố này. Với khí hậu mát mẻ quanh năm và khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp, Hòa Ninh là nơi lý tưởng để thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát.

Ngoài ra, Hòa Ninh cũng nằm gần các điểm du lịch nổi tiếng khác của Đà Nẵng như Bán đảo Sơn Trà, Cầu Rồng và Bãi biển Mỹ Khê. Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vùng đất này và trải nghiệm sự hòa quyện giữa thiên nhiên và văn hóa đặc trưng của Đà Nẵng.

Hướng dẫn đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills từ sân bay gần Đà Nẵng

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một điểm đến tuyệt vời tại Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam, và để đến đó từ sân bay, bạn có một số lựa chọn thuận tiện. Sân bay quốc tế Đà Nẵng là sân bay gần nhất, cách khoảng 35km từ Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Có một số phương tiện bạn có thể sử dụng để di chuyển từ sân bay đến đây.

Một lựa chọn phổ biến là sử dụng dịch vụ taxi. Bạn có thể tìm các công ty taxi tại sân bay và đặt xe để đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Điều này đảm bảo rằng bạn sẽ có một hành trình thuận tiện và thoải mái. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón của khách sạn để đến nơi.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt công cộng để đến Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Xe buýt là một lựa chọn kinh tế và tiện lợi. Bạn có thể tìm hiểu về các tuyến xe buýt và lịch trình từ sân bay hoặc hỏi nhân viên tại quầy thông tin sân bay để biết thêm thông tin chi tiết về cách đi xe buýt từ sân bay đến khách sạn.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Nằm gần Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills, du khách sẽ có cơ hội khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng tại Đà Nẵng. Ba Na Hills, một khu du lịch nổi tiếng, nằm cách khách sạn chỉ trong khoảng cách ngắn. Du khách có thể tận hưởng không khí mát mẻ và khám phá những công trình kiến trúc độc đáo tại đây. Một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua là Cầu Vàng, một cây cầu nổi tiếng với kiến trúc độc đáo và tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp. Du khách cũng có thể tham quan Bà Nà Hills, một khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng với cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp và các hoạt động giải trí thú vị.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng hấp dẫn như Beer Plaza, Arapang, Thien Dia Restaurant, La Lavande, Little Tokyo in Ba Na Hills, L'etable, La Pensee, Kavkaz, KUNGFU NOODLE RESTAURANT và Taiga restaurant. Với sự đa dạng về món ăn và phong cách, khách sạn này là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho du khách muốn khám phá ẩm thực đa quốc gia. Từ những món ăn phương Tây tinh tế cho đến ẩm thực Á Đông truyền thống, bạn có thể tìm thấy tất cả tại khu vực này. Hãy thưởng thức những món ăn ngon và trải nghiệm không gian ấm cúng của những nhà hàng xung quanh khách sạn.

Giá trung bình phòng tại Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills so với giá trung bình phòng tại Đà Nẵng

Nếu bạn đang tìm kiếm một trải nghiệm lưu trú đẳng cấp tại Đà Nẵng, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời. Với giá trung bình chỉ $134 mỗi đêm, bạn sẽ được tận hưởng một không gian sang trọng và tiện nghi tại khu nghỉ dưỡng này. So với giá trung bình phòng tại Đà Nẵng là $79, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills có giá hơi cao hơn, nhưng đáng đồng tiền bát gạo bởi sự hoàn hảo trong từng chi tiết.

Đánh giá khách hàng tích cực về Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Khách sạn này không chỉ có dịch vụ tốt mà còn có một không gian đẹp và lãng mạn. Phòng ốc sạch sẽ và thoải mái, nhân viên thân thiện và nhiệt tình. Đặc biệt, khách hàng rất hài lòng với bữa sáng ngon và đa dạng. Khách sạn này còn có vị trí thuận tiện và gần gũi, mang lại sự tiện lợi cho khách hàng. Một số khách hàng còn nhấn mạnh về cảnh quan đẹp và hồ bơi tuyệt vời tại khách sạn. Tóm lại, Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách khi đến Đà Nẵng.

Sự hài lòng của khách hàng với Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills đã nhận được những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng với tổng điểm 8.7 trên 10. Khách hàng đánh giá cao sự hữu ích của dịch vụ này với điểm số 8.5 cho giá trị, 8.5 cho tiện nghi và 8.7 cho sự sạch sẽ. Đặc biệt, vị trí của khách sạn nhận được sự đánh giá cao nhất với điểm số 9.3. 

Khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi, cho phép du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận đến các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng ở Đà Nẵng. Với điểm số 9.3 cho vị trí, khách hàng đánh giá cao khả năng di chuyển thuận tiện từ khách sạn đến các địa điểm du lịch. 

Không chỉ vị trí thuận lợi mà khách sạn còn được đánh giá cao về hiệu suất của nhân viên. Với điểm số 8.7 cho hiệu suất nhân viên, khách hàng đã bày tỏ sự hài lòng với dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tận tâm của đội ngũ nhân viên tại khách sạn Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills. Các nhân viên nhiệt tình và chu đáo sẽ đảm bảo du khách có một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Đà Nẵng.

faq.question: Lựa chọn ăn uống tại Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills)
faq.answer: Bắt đầu ngày mới tại Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills với các lựa chọn ăn uống và ẩm thực như ẩm thực châu Á và tự chọn để quý khách có thể thưởng thức và lựa chọn.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có quán bar trong khuôn viên không?
faq.answer: Tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ với ly đồ uống ngon lành tại bar ở Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills, chỉ cách quý khách một vài bước chân để quý khách có thể thưởng thức một hoặc hai ly nước bất cứ khi nào mình muốn.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay không?
faq.answer: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay theo yêu cầu với một khoản phụ thu cho 580000 VND theo tiền tệ địa phương. Để yêu cầu, chỉ cần đánh dấu vào ô trống trong phiếu đặt phòng, ngay trước khi thanh toán.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có dịch vụ xe đưa đón tham quan khu vực lân cận không?
faq.answer: Để di chuyển quanh thành phố, Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón để giúp quý khách dễ dàng đi đến các địa điểm mình muốn một cách thuận tiện.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có bãi đỗ xe không?
faq.answer: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills có bãi đỗ xe lân cận miễn phí để khách sử dụng phương tiện riêng có thể tận dụng cơ sở vật chất tại chỗ nghỉ khi lưu trú tại đây. Vui lòng liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú để biết thêm thông tin hoặc đăng nhập vào tài khoản Agoda và liên hệ với cơ sở lưu trú thông qua hộp trò chuyện nhắn tin trực tiếp của Agoda.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) thực hiện các biện pháp nào để giữ vệ sinh, an toàn và sạch sẽ?
faq.answer: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills đáp ứng tiêu chuẩn của chúng tôi về an toàn và sạch sẽ bằng việc cung cấp nước rửa tay và khử trùng hằng ngày tại các khu vực chung. Cơ sở lưu trú này cũng trang bị bác sĩ/y tá trực, bộ dụng cụ sơ cứu, Kiểm tra thân nhiệt cho khách và nhân viên, nhân viên được đào tạo về giao thức an toàn, khẩu trang miễn phí và nhiệt kế cơ thể như là các biện pháp phòng ngừa an toàn và vệ sinh toàn diện.

faq.question: Có các điểm tham quan nào gần Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) và trong khoảng cách đi bộ?
faq.answer: Trong thời gian lưu trú tại Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills, hãy bắt đầu kỳ nghỉ của quý khách bằng cách khám phá các điểm tham quan gần nhất, trong khoảng cách đi bộ từ cơ sở lưu trú như Vườn hoa Le Jardin D'Amour, Chùa Linh Ứng và Cầu Vàng.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có mấy lầu?
faq.answer: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills có tổng cộng 5 lầu.

faq.question: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) có mấy phòng?
faq.answer: Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills có tổng cộng 461 các phòng phòng.

faq.question: Tại Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills), khách thường lưu trú trong bao lâu?
faq.answer: Khách trước đây đã được xác thực lưu trú tạiMercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills có thời gian lưu trú trung bình mỗi đêm là 1 đêm tại cơ sở lưu trú này.

faq.question: Điểm trung bình từ khách đi theo nhóm dành cho Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills)
faq.answer: 8.8 là điểm số trung bình của khách đi theo nhóm trước đây đã nghỉ tại Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills đánh giá cơ sở lưu trú này. Quý khách có thể xem các đánh giá chi tiết hơn của khách hàng và nhận xét bằng cách lọc theo đối tượng khách đã được xác thực ở phần đánh giá.

faq.question: Giờ nhận phòng và trả phòng ở Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills)
faq.answer: Nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và trả phòng cho đến 10:30 AM. Quý khách có thể yêu cầu nhận phòng sớm hoặc trả phòng muộn trong lúc đặt phòng, phụ thuộc vào tình trạng phòng trống. Khách nhận phòng hoặc trả phòng trước hoặc sau khoảng thời gian chỉ định có thể phải thanh toán một khoản phụ phí.

embedding_text:
Mercure Đà Nẵng French Village Bà Nà Hills (Mercure Danang French Village Bana Hills) - khách sạn 4.0 sao tại Đà Nẵng.
Địa chỉ: Th n An Sơn - X B N - Th nh phố Đ Nẵng - Việt Nam, Hòa Ninh, Đà Nẵng, Việt Nam.
Đỗ xe và Wi-Fi luôn miễn phí, vì vậy quý khách có thể giữ liên lạc, đến và đi tùy ý. Nằm ở vị trí trung tâm tại Hòa Ninh của Đà Nẵng, chỗ nghỉ này đặt quý khách ở gần các điểm thu hút và tùy chọn ăn uống thú vị. Được xếp hạng 4 sao, chỗ nghỉ chất lượng cao này cho phép khách nghỉ sử dụng bể bơi trong nhà, mát-xa và bồn tắm nước nóng ngay trong khuôn viên.
Tiện ích: Bi-a, Bàn làm việc, Bàn tiếp tân [24 giờ], Bãi đỗ xe [gần bên], Bãi đỗ xe [miễn phí], Bãi đỗ xe có nhân viên, Bình chữa cháy, Băng niêm phong phòng dành cho khách sau khi vệ sinh, Bảng phi tiêu, Bảo vệ [24 giờ], Bể bơi, Bể bơi [trong nhà], Bể bơi [trẻ em], Bể bơi có tầm nhìn, Bồn ngâm chân, Bồn tắm nước nóng, Bữa sáng [tự chọn], Bữa sáng kiểu Á, Bữa sáng trong phòng, CCTV bên ngoài chỗ nghỉ, CCTV trong khu vực chung, Các loại khăn, Các môn thể thao dưới nước (không có động cơ), Cách bày bàn ăn an toàn, Có cung cấp hóa đơn, Có thể yêu cầu không khử trùng phòng, Công viên giải trí, Cơ sở vật chất cho họp mặt/tiệc lớn, Cửa hàng, Cửa sổ.
Điểm đánh giá 8.8/10 dựa trên 18998 đánh giá.
Khách hay nhắc đến: Dịch vụ, Bữa sáng, Địa điểm, Độ sạch sẽ, Nhận phòng, Độ thoải mái của phòng, Không khí, Kích thước phòng.
Các loại phòng: Superior room with King Size Bed; Deluxe room with King Size Bed; Duplex Suite with 1 King bed; Standard room with King Size Bed; Standard room with Twin Beds; Superior room with Twin Beds; Deluxe room with Twin Beds; Family Superior with 1 King size bed and 1 Sing le bed.
Gần: Vườn hoa Le Jardin D'Amour, Chùa Linh Ứng, Cầu Vàng, Cáp treo Bà Nà, Ba Na Hills, Bà Nà Hills.
